subclassFeature.name: Psionic Casting
entries: Your spells require no verbal or somatic components.

subclassFeature.name: Telepathic Metaconcert
entries: You can communicate telepathically with creatures within range, sharing thoughts and coordinating actions.

subclassFeature.name: Psychic Defenses
entries: You gain resistance to psychic damage and advantage against charm and fear effects.

subclassFeature.name: Psionic Augmentation
entries: You can increase spell level using sorcery points.

subclassFeature.name: Psychic Transcendence
entries: You gain multiple resistances, immunity to disease and poison, and improved saving throws.

subclassFeature.name: The Visage
entries: Your patron is one you have never met, though you see them regularly. They come to you in your dreams, and whisper of your potential, revealing to you pathways to power. Though you can only vaguely recall these encounters, the powers they grant you are real. But does that necessarily mean your patron is real as well? Is the visage in your dreams an entity foreign to your mind, come to visit you in the night and entreat with or tempt you? Or is the visage your own, a glimpse into your future, one where you wield the power of dreams?

subclassFeature.name: Expanded Spell List
entries: The Visage lets you choose from an expanded list of spells when you learn a warlock spell. The following spells are added to the warlock spell list for you.

rows: 1st
{@spell dream lock|TalvakrisGuidetoAdar}, {@spell sleep|PHB}
2nd
{@spell dream link|TalvakrisGuidetoAdar}, {@spell phantasmal force|PHB}
3rd
{@spell dream spirit|TalvakrisGuidetoAdar}, {@spell phantom steed|PHB}
4th
{@spell greater invisibility|PHB}, {@spell phantasmal killer|PHB}
5th
{@spell dreamwalk|TalvakrisGuidetoAdar}, {@spell dream|PHB}

subclassFeature.name: Manipulative Insight
entries: You can target one creature you can see as an action and attempt to read, and possibly influence, their ambitions, desires, or fears. The target must make a Wisdom saving throw against your spell save DC. A creature with an Intelligence of 3 or lower, or that doesn't understand any language, automatically succeeds on the saving throw. On a failed save, you can read the target's surface thoughts as long as you concentrate (as though {@status concentration||concentrating} on a spell), for up to 1 hour.

You also gain a vague sense of the creature's deepest desires or fears. Once while you concentrate, you can pull on the target's emotions as a bonus action to make the target either {@condition charmed} or {@condition frightened} for as long as you concentrate. If the {@condition charmed} or {@condition frightened} creature takes damage, it can begin repeating the saving throw at the end of each of its subsequent turns, ending this effect on a success.
You can use this feature a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a long rest.

subclassFeature.name: Harness Visions
entries: Whenever you sleep during a long rest, roll a {@dice d20}. On a roll of 2 through 20, you can decide whether you have dreamlike visions or nightmarish ones during your sleep.

On a roll of 1, you have a nightmare. When you finish a long rest, you can harness your dreams or nightmares, turning them into impulses that can instill moments of heroism or dread. Depending on which you experienced, you gain one special reaction below:

entries.name: Dreams
entries: Whenever a creature you can see within 30 feet of you is about to make an attack roll, a saving throw, or an ability check, you can use your reaction to grant the creature advantage on their attack, save, or check.

entries.name: Nightmares
entries: Whenever a creature you can see within 30 feet of you is about to make an attack roll, a saving throw, or an ability check, you can use your reaction to impose disadvantage on the creature's attack, save, or check.
You can use this reaction a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a long rest.

subclassFeature.name: Project Dream Spirit
entries: You gain the ability to project a spirit of dreams and nightmares into reality. You can call forth this dream spirit as an action, and it manifests in an unoccupied space that you can see within 90 feet of you. This corporeal form uses the {@creature Dream Spirit|TalvakrisGuidetoAdar} stat block. Whenever you call forth this spirit, choose an emotion: Despair, Fear, Fury, Joy, or Pride. The creature resembles a quori spirit tied to each emotion; du'ulora (Fury), hashalaq (Joy), kalaraq (Pride), tsucora or tsoreva (Fear), or usvapna (Despair). Your choice determines certain traits in its stat block. The creature disappears when it drops to 0 hit points, or until you finish a short or long rest.

The creature is an ally to you and your companions. In combat, the creature shares your initiative count, but it takes its turns immediately after yours. It obeys your telepathic commands (no action required by you). If you don't issue any, it takes the {@action Dodge} action and uses its move to avoid danger.

You can use this feature once, and you regain the ability to do so when you finish a long rest. You can also use this feature by expending a spell slot. You can only have one dream spirit manifested at a time; if you use this feature again while the first dream spirit still exists, the older dream spirit disappears.

subclassFeature.name: Reality Revision
entries: You can attempt to reject reality, and replace it with your own. As an action, you assert your will, describing to the DM a revision in reality you would like to occur, and roll a {@dice d20}. If you roll a number equal to or lower than your half warlock level, your chosen reality manifests and becomes real. The DM chooses the exact nature of how your reality manifests; the effect of any spell of up to 7th level is appropriate.
If you manage to manifest your reality, you can't use this feature again for {@dice 1d4} days. Otherwise; you can use it again after you finish a long rest.
At 20th level, your attempt to revise reality succeeds automatically, no roll required.

trait.name: Flyby Mount
entries: The asperi and its rider don't provoke opportunity attacks when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

trait.name: Wind Immunity
entries: Natural or magical winds have no effect on the asperi or its rider, unless it wishes to be affected.

action.name: Hooves
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) bludgeoning damage.

bonus.name: Ride the Wind
entries: The asperi takes the Dash action to fly. Additionally, if it flies in the same direction as prevailing winds, its flying speed increases to 90 feet until the end of its turn.

reaction.name: Uncanny Reflexes
entries: The asperi halves the damage that it or its rider takes from an attack that hits it. The asperi must be able to see the attacker.

reaction.name: Feather Fall (1st-Level Spell; 4/Day)
entries: The asperi casts {@spell feather fall}, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability.

trait.name: Flyby
entries: The roc doesn't provoke opportunity attacks when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

trait.name: Keen Sight
entries: The roc has advantage on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks that rely on sight.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (2/Day)
entries: If the roc fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The roc makes three attacks: one Beak attack and two Talon attacks.

action.name: Beak
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 15} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}27 ({@damage 4d8 + 9}) piercing damage.

action.name: Talon
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 15} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}16 ({@damage 2d6 + 9}) slashing damage, and the target is {@condition grappled} (escape {@dc 19}).
Until this grapple ends, the target is {@condition restrained}. The roc has two talons, each of which can grapple a creature.

legendary.name: Rake
entries: The roc makes one Talon attack.

legendary.name: Wing Attack (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: The roc beats its wings. Each creature within 15 feet of the roc must succeed on a {@dc 23} Dexterity saving throw or take 16 ({@damage 2d6 + 9}) bludgeoning damage and be knocked {@condition prone}. The roc can then fly up to half its flying speed.

legendary.name: Chaotic Display (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: The roc spreads its wings wide, and a dazzling, wild array of prismatic colors emanates from it.

Each color in the display has a different power and effect. Each creature in a 120-foot cone must make a {@dc 23} Dexterity saving throw. For each target, roll a {@dice d6} to determine which color of the display affects it:

items.name: 1. Red
entries: The target takes 35 ({@damage 10d6}) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

items.name: 2. Orange
entries: The target takes 35 ({@damage 10d6}) acid damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

items.name: 3. Yellow
entries: The target takes 35 ({@damage 10d6}) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

items.name: 4. Green
entries: The target takes 35 ({@damage 10d6}) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

items.name: 5. Blue
entries: The target takes 35 ({@damage 10d6}) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

items.name: 6. Indigo
entries: On a failed save, the target is {@condition restrained}. It must then make a Constitution saving throw at the end of each of its turns. If it successfully saves three times, the effect ends. If it fails its save three times, it permanently turns to stone and is subjected to the {@condition petrified} condition. The successes and failures don't need to be consecutive; keep track of both until the target collects three of a kind.

trait.name: Cold Weather Acclimation
entries: The rabbit is naturally adapted to cold climates.

action.name: Double Kick
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 3} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}2 bludgeoning damage.

monster.name: Rendesa
languages: understand Quori and Riedran but can't speak; telepathy 30 ft.

trait.name: Inertial Armor
entries: While the rendesa is conscious, its AC cannot be lower than 13 plus its proficiency bonus.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The rendesa has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Gore
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) piercing damage. If the rendesa moved at least 20 feet straight toward the target immediately before the hit, that target must succeed on a {@dc 15} Strength saving throw or be knocked {@condition prone}. If the target is knocked {@condition prone}, the rendesa can immediately make one attack with its hooves against the same target.

action.name: Hooves
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}12({@dice 2d6 + 5}) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Water Walk (3rd-Level Spell; 1/Day)
entries: The rendesa casts {@spell water walk}, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Psionic)
headerEntries: The couatl casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 18}):

trait.name: Magic Weapons
entries: The couatl's weapon attacks are magical.

trait.name: Oracular Foresight
entries: The couatl can't be {@status surprised} and has advantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws. Additionally, other creatures have disadvantage on all attack rolls against the couatl.

trait.name: Shielded Mind
entries: The couatl is immune to scrying and any effect that would sense its emotions, read its thoughts, or detect its location.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The couatl makes three attacks, only one of which can be a bite attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) piercing damage, and the target must make a {@dc 17} Constitution saving throw, taking 21 ({@damage 6d6}) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the poison damage reduces the target to 0 hit points, the target is stable but {@condition poisoned} for 24 hours, even after regaining hit points, and is {@condition unconscious} while {@condition poisoned} in this way.

action.name: Constrict
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) bludgeoning damage, and the target is {@condition grappled} (escape {@dc 20}) if it is Medium or smaller. Until this grapple ends, the target is {@condition restrained}. The couatl's elongated, serpentine body can coil around and grapple up to two targets. If the couatl has two creatures {@condition grappled} this way, it cannot use constrict against other targets.

bonus.name: Ethereal Jaunt
entries: The couatl can magically shift from the Material Plane to the Ethereal Plane, or vice versa.

reaction.name: Oracular Warning
entries: When another creature the couatl can see within 120 feet of it makes a saving throw, the creature can roll the save with advantage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Psionic)
headerEntries: The couatl casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 25}):

trait.name: Celestial Weapons
entries: The couatl's weapon attacks are magical. When the couatl hits with any weapon attack, the attack deals an extra {@damage 3d10} radiant damage (included in the attack).

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the couatl fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The couatl has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Soul Sight
entries: The couatl magically knows the alignment and creature type of each creature it can see with its truesight.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The couatl makes two attacks: one with its bite and one constrict.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 15} to hit, reach 15 ft., one creature. {@h}17 ({@damage 2d8 + 8}) piercing damage plus 16 ({@damage 3d10}) radiant damage.

action.name: Constrict
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 15} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}18 ({@damage 3d6 + 8}) bludgeoning damage plus 16 ({@damage 3d10}) radiant damage, and the target is {@condition grappled} (escape {@dc 18}) if it is Large or smaller. Until this grapple ends, the target is {@condition restrained}. The couatl's elongated, serpentine body can coil around and grapple up to three targets. If the couatl has three creatures {@condition grappled} this way, it cannot use constrict against other targets.

action.name: Celestial Channeling (1/Day)
entries: The couatl merges with one willing recipient humanoid it can see within 5 feet of it; the couatl then disappears, and the recipient channels much of the couatl's power.

The couatl cannot take any actions but maintains its awareness, using the recipient's senses, and can communicate telepathically with the recipient. The couatl can't be targeted by any attack, spell, or other effect, except ones that dismiss or banish celestials. The recipient retains its own statistics, but gains 225 temporary hit points, a fly speed of 60 feet, and the couatl's Legendary Resistance, Magic Resistance and Soul Sight traits, plus the couatl's Spellcasting (Psionics) action and all of its Legendary Actions, including all ways to spend them.

The channeling lasts until the recipient drops to 0 hit points or dies, the couatl ends it as a bonus action, or the couatl is banished or forced out by an effect like the {@spell dispel evil and good} spell. When the possession ends, the couatl reappears in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the recipient.

legendary.name: Attack
entries: The couatl makes a weapon attack.

legendary.name: Cast a Spell (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: The couatl uses Spellcasting.

legendary.name: Dazzling Halo (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: The couatl focuses its rainbow halo on one creature it can see within 120 feet. If the creature can see the couatl, it must make a {@dc 25} Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the creature takes 22 ({@damage 4d10}) radiant damage and is {@condition blinded} and {@condition stunned} for 1 hour. On a successful save, a creature takes half damage and is {@condition blinded} until the end of its next turn. A creature that is both {@condition blinded} and {@condition stunned} by this legendary action can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending both conditions on a success.

legendary.name: Wings of Glory (Costs 3 Actions)
entries: The couatl spreads its rainbowhued wings of fire and flies up to 60 feet without provoking opportunity attacks. At one point during this flight, the wings flare and each creature within a 60-foot radius of the couatl must make a {@dc 25} Dexterity saving throw, taking 27 ({@damage 6d8}) fire damage and 27 ({@damage 6d8}) radiant damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The avoral casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 14}):
will: {@spell protection from evil and good} (self only)

trait.name: Flyby
entries: The avoral doesn't provoke opportunity attacks when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

trait.name: Keen Sight
entries: The avoral has advantage on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks that rely on sight.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The avoral has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The avoral makes two Talon attacks and uses Wing

action.name: Attack
entries: Alternatively, it can use Celestial Missile twice.

action.name: Talon
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d6 + 6}) piercing damage.

action.name: Wing Attack
entries: The avoral beats its wings. Each creature within 5 feet of the avoral must succeed on a {@dc 16} Dexterity saving throw or take 8 ({@damage 1d6 + 5}) bludgeoning damage and be knocked {@condition prone}.
The avoral can then fly up to half its flying speed.

action.name: Celestial Missile
entries: One creature the avoral can see takes 10 ({@damage 3d6}) radiant damage.

action.name: Lightning Bolt {@recharge 5}
entries: The avoral summons a bolt of lightning in a 20-foot-radius, 120-foot-tall cylinder. Each creature in the cylinder must make a {@dc 14} Dexterity saving throw, taking 14 ({@damage 4d6}) lightning damage and 14 ({@damage 4d6}) thunder damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The lupinal casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}):

trait.name: Keen Smell
entries: The lupinal has advantage on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks that rely on smell.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The lupinal has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The lupinal makes a Bite attack and an attack with its Claws. If it is able to, the lupinal can use Celestial Missile in place of any of these attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d4 + 5}) piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it is {@condition grappled} (escape {@dc 15}) and must succeed on a {@dc 16} Strength saving throw or be knocked {@condition prone}.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) slashing damage.

action.name: Celestial Missile (3/Day)
entries: One creature the lupinal can see takes 10 ({@damage 3d6}) radiant damage.

action.name: Frightful Howl
entries: Each non-celestial creature within 120 feet of the lupinal that can hear it must succeed on a {@dc 15} Wisdom saving throw or become {@condition frightened} for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the lupinal's Frightful Howl for the next 24 hours.

reaction.name: Dodge Missile
entries: The lupinal adds 5 to its AC against one ranged attack that would hit it. To do so, the lupinal must see the attacker.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The ursinal casts one of the following spells, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 18}):

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The ursinal has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The ursinal makes two Claw attacks or uses Celestial Missile twice.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 1d10 + 5}) piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it is {@condition grappled} (escape {@dc 17}).

action.name: Celestial Missile
entries: One creature the ursinal can see takes 10 ({@damage 3d6}) radiant damage.

action.name: Radiant Fog (6th-Level Spell; 1/Day)
entries: The ursinal conjures a brilliant, shimmering cloud of nearly solid fog in a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on a point within 120 feet of it. The sphere spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured and difficult terrain. A creature that enters the sphere for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there must make a {@dc 18} Constitution saving throw or take 27 ({@damage 6d8}) radiant damage. The sphere lasts for 10 minutes, and the ursinal can move it up to 30 feet as a bonus action.

reaction.name: Uncanny Dodge
entries: The ursinal halves the damage that it takes from an attack that hits it. The ursinal must be able to see the attacker.

resist.note: from nonmagical attacks not made with adamantine weapons

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: If the gargoyle is motionless at the start of combat, it has advantage on its initiative roll. Moreover, if a creature hasn't observed the gargoyle move or act, that creature must succeed on a {@dc 18} Intelligence ({@skill Investigation}) check to discern that the gargoyle isn't a statue.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The gargoyle makes five attacks: one with its Bite and four with its Claws.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) piercing damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d4 + 4}) piercing damage.

trait.name: Disguised Appearance
entries: While the dryad has half or more of its hit points, it is indistinguishable from the humanoid whose flesh it wears.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The dryad regains 10 hit points at the start of its turn if it has half or more of its hit points.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The dryad makes two longsword attacks.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) slashing damage, or 9 ({@damage 1d10 + 4}) slashing damage if used with two hands, plus 6 ({@damage 1d12}) poison damage.

resist.note: damage from magic weapons and other magical effects

trait.name: Magic Absorption
entries: The essence reaver has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects. If the essence reaver succeeds on a saving throw against a magical effect, it gains temporary hit points equal to 5 times the spell's level, or 20 temporary hit points if the effect has no level.

trait.name: Persistent Wounds
entries: Damage the essence reaver deals resists magical healing effects. When casting a spell or using a magical effect to restore hit points to a creature who has been damaged by an essence reaver, the healer must make a {@dc 14} spellcasting ability check, or a {@dc 14} Charisma check if the healer has no spellcasting ability. On a failure, the spell or effect does not restore any hit points, and any resources used to cast the spell or use the effect are lost. On a success, the spell or effect restores hit points as normal.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The essence reaver makes three attacks: one with its Bite, one with its Claws, and one with its Tail.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) piercing damage plus, if the essence reaver has any temporary hit points, 9 ({@damage 2d8}) force damage.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) slashing damage plus, if the essence reaver has any temporary hit points, 9 ({@damage 2d8}) force damage.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a spellcaster, it loses its highest-level spell slot, or the ability to cast its highest-level spell, and the essence reaver gains temporary hit points equal to 5 times the spell or spell slot's level. If the target is not a spellcaster, or is a spellcaster with no spells or spell slots remaining, one random magic item in the target's possession loses its magical properties and the essence reaver gains 20 temporary hit points. Lost spells and spell slots are restored after a short or long rest, and affected magic items regain their magical properties after 1 hour.

action.name: Stunning Screech {@recharge}
entries: The essence reaver emits a mindpiercing screech. All creatures except for essence reavers within 30 feet must succeed on a {@dc 14} Constitution saving throw or be {@condition stunned} until the end of the essence reaver's next turn.

action.name: Detect Essence (1st-Level Spell; Psionic; At-Will)
entries: The essence reaver casts {@spell detect magic}, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability. In addition to the spell's normal effects, it also reveals to the essence reaver a magical aura around creatures capable of casting spells. This aura allows the essence reaver to know the level of the highest-level spell the spellcaster is currently able to cast.

monster.name: Kalavay
languages: any languages it knew in life

trait.name: Life Sense
entries: The kalavay can sense the location of any creature within 60 feet of it, unless that creature's type is Construct or Undead.

trait.name: Wanderer
entries: The kalavay can't enter a residence or settlement without an invitation from one of the occupants.

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The kalavay can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

trait.name: Unusual Nature
entries: The kavalay doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

action.name: Withering Touch
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d6 + 2}) necrotic damage.

action.name: Etherealness
entries: The kavalay enters the Ethereal Plane from the Material Plane, or vice versa. It is visible on the Material Plane white it is in the Border Ethereal, and vice versa, yet it can't affect or be affected by anything on the other plane.

monster.name: Spectral Savant
languages: any languages it knew in life

spellcasting.name: Spectral Spellcasting (Psionics)
headerEntries: The spectral savant retains the knowledge of the spells it could cast in life, but not the magical potential to cast them. It must steal the potential to do so with its Power Drain attack. When it has the ability to do so, the spectral savant casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}):

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The spectral savant can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

trait.name: Inertial Armor
entries: While the spectral savant is conscious, its AC cannot be lower than 13 plus its proficiency bonus.

trait.name: Unusual Nature
entries: The spectral savant doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The spectral savant makes a Power Drain attack then uses its Spectral Spellcasting action.

action.name: Energy Ray
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 90 ft., one target. {@h}21 ({@damage 6d6}) damage of a type chosen by the psion: cold, fire, lightning, or thunder.

action.name: Power Drain
entries: {@atk ms} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) psychic damage and the spectral savant drains magical energy from the target. If the target is able to cast spells, it loses its highest-level spell slot or one use of an ability to cast the highest level spell it has remaining, and the spectral savant then gains the ability to cast one of the spells listed in Spectral Spellcasting of equal or lower level.

trait.name: Air Form
entries: The elemental can enter a hostile creature's space and stop there. It can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

action.name: Shocking Slam
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) thunder damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) lightning damage and the target can't take reactions until the start of its next turn.

action.name: Storm Bolt {@recharge}
entries: A stroke of lightning forming a line 120 feet long and 5 feet wide blasts out from the elemental in a direction it chooses, accompanied by a clap of clangorous thunder in a 30-foot radius sphere centered on the elemental. Each creature in the line or sphere must make a {@dc 16} Constitution saving throw. A creature in the line takes 10 ({@damage 3d6}) lightning damage, and a creature in the sphere takes 10 ({@damage 3d6}) thunder damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. A creature in both the sphere and the line makes one save, but takes damage from both areas. The lightning ignites flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.
The thunder is audible up to 1 mile away.

monster.name: Unbodied
languages: any one language (usually Adaran); telepathy 120 ft.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Psionics)
headerEntries: The unbodied casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 14}):

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The unbodied can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

trait.name: Inertial Armor
entries: While the unbodied is conscious, its AC cannot be lower than 13 plus its proficiency bonus.

trait.name: Psychic Rejuvenation
entries: If the unbodied is reduced to 0 hit points, it discorporates and reforms {@dice 1d6} days later, regaining all of its hit points.

Reducing an unbodied to 0 hit points while it is under the effects of the {@spell feeblemind} spell permanently prevents the unbodied from reforming after discorporation, effectively destroying the unbodied.

trait.name: Telekinetic Touch
entries: The unbodied can telekinetically manipulate unattended objects within 30 feet of it, moving them to another location within the same range, in any orientation it desires. It can affect up to three objects simultaneously, but it can only affect up to 250 pounds of matter at once. If the unbodied uses this ability to manipulate weapons and shields in its own space and melee reach, it can wield them as effectively as a creature with a body could.

trait.name: Unusual Nature
entries: An unbodied doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

trait.name: Veiled Consciousness
entries: The unbodied is immune to all divination and clairsentience effects, including truesight.

action.name: Disruption
entries: {@atk ms} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. {@h}7 ({@damage 2d6}) force damage.

action.name: Assume Likeness
entries: The unbodied can change its appearance into any Small, Medium, or Large creature. Weapons, armor, clothing, or other details appropriate to its new likeness are included in the change.

Most unbodied prefer an attractive humanoid likeness. An unbodied does not have a true shape. This likeness is an intangible illusion telepathically projected into the minds of all creatures that can see the unbodied. The unbodied remains in a likeness until it takes another action to change it. Its statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The quori makes two Mindblade attacks.

action.name: Mindblade
entries: {@atk ms} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/90 ft., one target. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) damage of a type chosen by the quori: necrotic or psychic.

action.name: Dimension Door (Psionics; 1/Day)
entries: The quori casts the {@spell dimension door} spell, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.

action.name: Possession {@recharge}
entries: One humanoid that the quori can see within 5 feet of it must succeed on a {@dc 13} Charisma saving throw or be possessed by the quori; the quori then disappears, and the target is {@condition incapacitated} and loses control of its body. The quori now controls the body but doesn't deprive the target of awareness. The quori can't be targeted by any attack, spell, or other effect, except ones that turn fiends, and it retains its alignment, Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma, and immunity to being {@condition charmed} and {@condition frightened}. It otherwise uses the possessed target's statistics, but doesn't gain access to the target's knowledge, class features, or proficiencies.

The possession lasts until the body drops to 0 hit points, the quori ends it as a bonus action, or the quori is turned or forced out by an effect like the {@spell dispel evil and good} spell. When the possession ends, the quori reappears in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the body. The target is immune to this quori's Possession for 24 hours after succeeding on the saving throw or after the possession ends.

bonus.name: Terror Spike
entries: If the quori hit a creature with a mindblade attack on its turn, it may use this bonus action to force the creature to make a {@dc 13} Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the creature becomes {@condition frightened} of the quori for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The quori makes three attacks: one Pincer attack, one attack with its Claws, and one Stinger attack.

action.name: Pincer
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d10 + 3}) bludgeoning damage. The target is {@condition grappled} (escape {@dc 14}) if it is a Large or smaller creature. The quori has two pincers, each of which can grapple one target.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}13 ({@damage 4d4 + 3}) slashing damage.

action.name: Stinger
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d10 + 3}) piercing damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d10}) psychic damage, and the target must succeed on a {@dc 14} Wisdom saving throw or be {@condition frightened} of (the quori for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. Spellcasting (Psionics). The quori casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 14}): At will: {@spell charm person} 1/day: {@spell fear} Possession (Recharge 6). One humanoid that the quori can see within 5 feet of it must succeed on a {@dc 14} Charisma saving throw or be possessed by the quori; the quori then disappears, and the target is {@condition incapacitated} and loses control of its body. The quori now controls the body but doesn't deprive the target of awareness. The quori can't be targeted by any attack, spell, or other effect, except ones that turn fiends, and it retains its alignment, Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma, and immunity to being {@condition charmed} and {@condition frightened}. It otherwise uses the possessed target's statistics, but doesn't gain access to the target's knowledge, class features, or proficiencies. The possession lasts until the body drops to 0 hit points, the quori ends it as a bonus action, or the quori is turned or forced out by an effect like the {@spell dispel evil and good} spell. When the possession ends, the quori reappears in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the body. The target is immune to this quori's Possession for 24 hours after succeeding on the saving throw or after the possession ends.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Psionics)
headerEntries: The quori casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}):

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The quori uses Mind Thrust twice.

action.name: Idyllic Touch
entries: {@atk ms} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d10 + 4}) force damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a {@dc 16} Wisdom saving throw or fall {@condition prone} in a fit of bliss or laughter.

action.name: Mind Thrust
entries: The quori targets a creature it can see within 60 feet of it. The target must make a {@dc 16} Wisdom saving throw, taking 18 ({@damage 4d8}) psychic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

action.name: Possession {@recharge}
entries: One humanoid that the quori can see within 5 feet of it must succeed on a {@dc 16} Charisma saving throw or be possessed by the quori; the quori then disappears, and the target is {@condition incapacitated} and loses control of its body. The quori now controls the body but doesn't deprive the target of awareness. The quori can't be targeted by any attack, spell, or other effect, except ones that turn fiends, and it retains its alignment, Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma, and immunity to being {@condition charmed} and {@condition frightened}. It otherwise uses the possessed target's statistics, but doesn't gain access to the target's knowledge, class features, or proficiencies.

The possession lasts until the body drops to 0 hit points, the quori ends it as a bonus action, or the quori is turned or forced out by an effect like the {@spell dispel evil and good} spell. When the possession ends, the quori reappears in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the body. The target is immune to this quori's Possession for 24 hours after succeeding on the saving throw or after the possession ends.

reaction.name: Empathic Feedback
entries: When the quori takes damage from a creature it can see within 60 feet of it, the quori can force that creature to succeed on a {@dc 16} Intelligence saving throw or take 11 ({@damage 2d10}) psychic damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Psionics)
headerEntries: The quori casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}):

trait.name: All-Around Vision
entries: The quori can't be {@status surprised} while it isn't {@condition incapacitated}.

trait.name: Aura of Fury
entries: Any creature of the quori's choice that enters a space within 60 of the quori, or starts its turn there, must succeed on a {@dc 16} Wisdom saving throw or become enraged for 1 minute. During that time, the enraged target has advantage on all melee attack rolls, and all attack rolls made against that target have advantage. An enraged target is subject to the quori's Impervious Fury reaction.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The quori has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Track Hatred
entries: When the quori deals damage to any creature, it forms a psychic link with the target for 24 hours. During that time, the quori has advantage on Wisdom ({@skill Survival}) checks to track the target. The quori can attempt to track the target at any range, even if it is on another plane of existence, and abilities such as the {@spell pass without trace} spell or the ranger's Vanish feature do not impede the quori's ability to track its target. Even when the quori is tracking while traveling, it remains alert to danger.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The quori makes three Tentacle attacks.

action.name: Tentacle
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) bludgeoning damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) fire damage, and the target is {@condition grappled} (escape {@dc 17}). Until this grapple ends, the target takes 10 ({@damage 3d6}) fire damage and 10 ({@damage 3d6}) psychic damage at the start of each of the quori's turns, and the quori can't use that tentacle against a different target. The quori has three tentacles.

action.name: Recall Agony {@recharge 5}
entries: The quori makes a creature recall the most agonizing moments of its past—or future. One creature within 60 feet of the quori must make a {@dc 16} Wisdom saving throw, taking 67 ({@damage 15d8}) psychic damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

action.name: Possession {@recharge}
entries: One humanoid that the quori can see within 5 feet of it must succeed on a {@dc 16} Charisma saving throw or be possessed by the quori; the quori then disappears, and the target is {@condition incapacitated} and loses control of its body. The quori now controls the body but doesn't deprive the target of awareness. The quori can't be targeted by any attack, spell, or other effect, except ones that turn fiends, and it retains its alignment, Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma, and immunity to being {@condition charmed} and {@condition frightened}. It otherwise uses the possessed target's statistics, but doesn't gain access to the target's knowledge, class features, or proficiencies.

The possession lasts until the body drops to 0 hit points, the quori ends it as a bonus action, or the quori is turned or forced out by an effect like the {@spell dispel evil and good} spell. When the possession ends, the quori reappears in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the body.
The target is immune to this quori's Possession for 24 hours after succeeding on the saving throw or after the possession ends.

reaction.name: Impervious Fury
entries: When an enraged creature targets the quori with an attack or spell, the quori can feed on and control the creature's rage.
The quori's AC increases by 5 until the start of its next turn, and the quori can cause the enraged creature to instead target another creature of the quori's choice within range.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Psionics)
headerEntries: The quori casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}):

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The quori makes four Pincer attacks.

action.name: Pincer
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 1d12 + 4}) bludgeoning damage and the target is {@condition grappled} (escape {@dc 15}). The quori has four pincers, each of which can grapple one target.

If a creature is hit by two pincer attacks in one turn, the creature must succeed on a {@dc 16} Charisma save. On a failure, the creature is {@condition incapacitated} for 1 round while its mind is filled with doubt and it hears thoughts of self-loathing.

action.name: Force Missiles
entries: The quori mentally projects 5 {@condition invisible} missiles of telekinetic force. Each missile hits a creature of the quori's choice that it can see within 120 feet of it. A missile deals 5 ({@damage 1d10}) force damage to its target. All missiles strike simultaneously, and the quori can direct them to hit one creature or several.

action.name: Crush Psyche (1/Day)
entries: The quori brutally crushes the mind of one creature within 60 feet of it that it can see. The creature must make a {@dc 16} Charisma saving throw, taking 52 ({@damage 8d12}) psychic damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one. This damage can't reduce a target's hit points below 1. If the target fails the saving throw, its hit point maximum is reduced for 1 hour by an amount equal to the psychic damage it took. Any effect that imparts immunity to psychic damage allows a creature's hit point maximum to return to normal before that time passes.

action.name: Possession {@recharge}
entries: One humanoid that the quori can see within 5 feet of it must succeed on a {@dc 16} Charisma saving throw or be possessed by the quori; the quori then disappears, and the target is {@condition incapacitated} and loses control of its body. The quori now controls the body but doesn't deprive the target of awareness. The quori can't be targeted by any attack, spell, or other effect, except ones that turn fiends, and it retains its alignment, Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma, and immunity to being {@condition charmed} and {@condition frightened}. It otherwise uses the possessed target's statistics, but doesn't gain access to the target's knowledge, class features, or proficiencies.

The possession lasts until the body drops to 0 hit points, the quori ends it as a bonus action, or the quori is turned or forced out by an effect like the {@spell dispel evil and good} spell. When the possession ends, the quori reappears in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the body.
The target is immune to this quori's Possession for 24 hours after succeeding on the saving throw or after the possession ends.

bonus.name: Mind Schism
entries: The quori uses Force Missiles or its Spellcasting action.
It is not limited to casting a cantrip if it casts a second spell in the same turn.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Psionics)
headerEntries: The quori casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 21}):

trait.name: All-Around Vision
entries: The quori can't be {@status surprised} while it isn't {@condition incapacitated}.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The quori has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The quori can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The quori makes two Soul Binding attacks. Alternatively, it can make four attacks with Telekinetic Blast.

action.name: Telekinetic Blast
entries: {@atk rs} {@hit 13} to hit, range 120 ft., one target. {@h}12 ({@damage 1d10 + 7}) force damage.

action.name: Soul Binding
entries: {@atk ms} {@hit 13} to hit, reach 50 ft., one creature. {@h}29 ({@damage 4d10 + 7}) necrotic damage. A creature reduced to 0 hit points from this attack dies and has its soul imprisoned in one of the quori's eyes. The target can't be revived by any means short of a {@spell wish} spell until the quori is destroyed.

action.name: Mind Seed (1/Day)
entries: The quori touches one humanoid, which must succeed on a {@dc 21} Intelligence saving throw or be cursed. The curse lasts until it's removed by a remove curse or {@spell greater restoration} spell.

The cursed target suffers 1 level of {@condition exhaustion} every 24 hours and finishing a long rest doesn't reduce its {@condition exhaustion}. If the cursed target reaches {@condition exhaustion} level 6, it doesn't die; it instead has its personality and mind replaced with a copy of the kalaraq's, and all its {@condition exhaustion} is removed. The mental copy of the kalaraq is not under its control.
Only the {@spell wish} spell can restore the cursed target's mind to its original personality.

action.name: Swarm of Eyes {@recharge}
entries: The quori creates a swarm of spectral eyes that fills a 30-foot-radius sphere centered on a point it can see within 60 feet of it. Each creature in that area must make a {@dc 21} Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 45 ({@damage 10d8}) psychic damage, and it is {@condition blinded} for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half as much damage and isn't {@condition blinded}. A {@condition blinded} creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

action.name: Possession {@recharge}
entries: One humanoid that the quori can see within 5 feet of it must succeed on a {@dc 21} Charisma saving throw or be possessed by the quori; the quori then disappears, and the target is {@condition incapacitated} and loses control of its body. The quori now controls the body but doesn't deprive the target of awareness. The quori can't be targeted by any attack, spell, or other effect, except ones that turn fiends, and it retains its alignment, Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma, and immunity to being {@condition charmed} and {@condition frightened}. It otherwise uses the possessed target's statistics, but doesn't gain access to the target's knowledge, class features, or proficiencies.

The possession lasts until the body drops to 0 hit points, the quori ends it as a bonus action, or the quori is turned or forced out by an effect like the {@spell dispel evil and good} spell. When the possession ends, the quori reappears in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the body.
The target is immune to this quori's Possession for 24 hours after succeeding on the saving throw or after the possession ends.

trait.name: Mountaineer
entries: The Adaran has advantage on {@skill Athletics} checks made to traverse mountainous terrain.

action.name: Club
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 2} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}2 ({@damage 1d4}) bludgeoning damage.

trait.name: Essence Form
entries: The dromite has damage resistance to the same type of damage that it deals with its Energy Ray attack. Each dromite psychokinetic can only deal one type of damage with Energy Ray, depending on its essence form: Torch essence deals fire damage, Ice essence deals cold damage, Glimmer essence deals lightning damage, and Voice essence deals thunder damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The dromite makes two Energy Ray attacks.

action.name: Energy Ray
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 90 ft., one target. {@h}14 ({@damage 4d6}) damage of a type depending on the dromite's essence form: cold, fire, lightning, or thunder.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Psionics)
headerEntries: The consort casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}):

trait.name: Hive Mind
entries: The consort is psychically linked to the other dromites of his hive. He can telepathically communicate with hive members within 5 miles and can sense the direction and distance to the hive members within this range. A creature protected by a {@spell mind blank} spell, a {@spell nondetection} spell, or similar magic can't be perceived in this manner.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The consort makes two Psionic Bolt or melee weapon attacks, then uses Consort's Command if able.

action.name: Scimitar
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) slashing damage plus 5 ({@damage 2d4}) force damage.

action.name: Psionic Bolt
entries: {@atk rs} {@hit 7} to hit, range 300 ft., one target. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) damage of a type chosen by the consort: force or psychic.

action.name: Consort's Command
entries: The consort psionically commands another dromite from his hive he can sense within 30 feet of him to use its reaction to make a weapon attack.

action.name: Synaptic Lance (5th-Level Spell; Psionic; 2/Day)
entries: The consort unleashes a lance of synaptic lightning from his brow at a creature within 120 feet of him. The target must make a {@dc 15} Intelligence saving throw. On a failed save, the target takes 14 ({@damage 4d6}) lightning damage and 14 ({@damage 4d6}) psychic damage and is {@condition incapacitated} until the start of the consort's next turn. On a successful save, the creature takes half as much damage and isn't {@condition incapacitated}.

bonus.name: Speed of Thought
entries: The consort takes the Dash action.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Psionics)
headerEntries: The queen casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}):

trait.name: Caustic Castigation
entries: Any creature that hits the queen with a melee attack while within 5 feet of her takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) acid damage.

action.name: Morningstar
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) piercing damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) poison damage.

action.name: Venom Spit
entries: {@atk rs} {@hit 7} to hit, range 60 ft., one target. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) poison damage.

action.name: Royal Exhalation (6th-Level Spell; Psionic; 2/Day)
entries: The queen psychometabolically augments her breath in one of the following ways:

action.name: Breath of Succor
entries: The queen exhales bolstering and restorative pheromones in a 40-foot cube. Each creature of the queen's choice in the area regains 23 ({@dice 4d8 + 5}) hit points and removes one disease or one of the following conditions affecting it: {@condition blinded}, {@condition deafened}, {@condition paralyzed}, or {@condition poisoned}

action.name: Scouring Breath
entries: The queen exhales a caustic cloud of venomous gas into a 40-foot cube originating from her. The cloud spreads around corners, and lasts for as long as the queen concentrates, up to 10 minutes, or until strong wind disperses it. The cube is heavily obscured and the queen can use a bonus action to move the cube 10 feet in any direction. When a creature enters the cube for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it must make a {@dc 16} Constitution saving throw. The creature takes 13 ({@damage 3d8}) acid damage and 13 ({@damage 3d8}) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
Creatures are affected even if they hold their breath or don't need to breathe.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The druid casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 17}):

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The druid uses Thorn Vine or Bolt of Chaos three times.
Alternatively, it can use Thorn Vine or Bolt of Chaos once, and use Spellcasting.

action.name: Grasping Thorns
entries: {@atk ms} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 30 ft., one target. {@h}21 ({@damage 6d6}) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, its speed is reduced by 10 feet until the start of the druid's next turn.

action.name: Bolt of Chaos
entries: {@atk rs} {@hit 9} to hit, range 120 ft., one target. {@h}18 ({@dice 4d8}) + 7 ({@damage 2d6}) damage. The number rolled on one of the d6s for this attack's damage (the druid's choice) determines the type of damage the target takes: 1 - Acid; 2 - Fire; 3 - Cold; 4 - Poison; 5 - Lightning; 6 - Thunder.

action.name: Unleash Entropy {@recharge 5}
entries: The druid tears open a temporary rift to Kythri at a point within 120 feet of itself that it can see. The area in a 30-foot-radius sphere centered on that point becomes difficult terrain until the end of the druid's next turn, including any portion of the sphere underground, in water, or in the air. Each creature in the area when the druid opens the rift must make a {@dc 17} Dexterity saving throw, taking 42 ({@damage 12d6}) damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. Roll a {@dice d6} to determine the damage type each affected creature individually takes: 1 - Acid; 2 - Fire; 3 - Cold; 4 - Poison; 5 - Lightning; 6 - Thunder.

action.name: Elemental Form (2/Day)
entries: The druid magically transforms into an air elemental, water elemental, fire elemental, or earth elemental for up to 5 hours. It can choose whether its equipment falls to the ground, melds with its new form, or is worn by the new form. The druid reverts to its true form if it dies or falls {@condition unconscious}. The druid can also revert to its true form using a bonus action.

While in an elemental form, the druid retains its game statistics, except for its AC, speeds, Strength and Dexterity scores, and its senses, which it uses the elemental's game statistics for. Additionally, the druid gains any traits and actions that the elemental has but that the druid normally lacks and the druid's weapon attacks while in elemental form are magical.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The scribe casts one of the following spells, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 14}):

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The arcanist makes two Arcane Burst attacks.

action.name: Arcane Burst
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft., one target. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d10 + 3}) force damage.

trait.name: Swordsage Maneuvers (1/Turn)
entries: When the swordsage makes a melee attack with a weapon, it can choose to add one of the following magical effects. The swordsage must choose an effect before the results of the attack roll are determined, and it only gains the effects if the attack hits. Once a particular effect is chosen, it cannot be chosen again until the swordsage finishes a short or long rest.

items.name: Clinging Shadow Strike
items.entry: The attack deals an extra 21 ({@damage 6d6}) necrotic damage. Additionally, the target must succeed on a {@dc 14} Wisdom saving throw or be {@condition blinded} until the end of the swordsage's next turn.

items.name: Erupting Brand
items.entry: The attack deals an extra 16 ({@damage 3d10}) fire damage and up to two other creatures the swordsage can see within 20 feet of the attack's target must succeed on {@dc 14} Dexterity saving throw or take the same amount of fire damage.

items.name: Time Severing Razor
items.entry: The attack deals an extra 28 ({@damage 8d6}) force damage. Additionally, the target must make a {@dc 14} Charisma saving throw. On a failed save, the target's speed is halved, it can't use reactions, and on its turn it can use either an action or a bonus action, not both. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending this effect on a success.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The swordsage makes two Rapier attacks.

action.name: Rapier
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) piercing damage.

bonus.name: Swordsage Stances
entries: The swordsage enters, ends, or changes its stance. A stance ends if the swordsage is {@condition incapacitated} or the swordsage enters another stance. Each stance has its own magical effect:

items.name: Balance on the Sky
items.entry: The swordsage gains a fly speed equal to half its walking speed.

items.name: Roots of the Mountain
items.entry: The swordsage cannot be knocked {@condition prone} or moved from its space against its will.

reaction.name: Diamond Mind Focus
entries: When the swordsage makes a saving throw against a magical effect that allows a saving throw to take only half damage, the swordsage instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the saving throw and only half damage if it fails.

trait.name: Unarmored Defense
entries: While the adept is wearing no armor and wielding no shield, its AC includes its Wisdom modifier.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The adept makes three Unarmed Strike attacks or five Dart attacks.

action.name: Unarmed Strike
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) bludgeoning damage. Once per turn, the adept can cause one of the following additional effects (choose one or roll a {@dice d4}):

items.name: 1-2: Knock Down
entries: The target must succeed on a {@dc 13} Dexterity saving throw or be knocked {@condition prone}.

items.name: 3-4: Push
entries: The target must succeed on a {@dc 13} Strength saving throw or be pushed up to 10 feet directly away from the adept.

action.name: Dart
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 5} to hit, range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) piercing damage.

reaction.name: Deflect Missile
entries: In response to being hit by a ranged weapon attack, the adept deflects the missile. The damage it takes from the attack is reduced by {@dice 1d10 + 3}. If the damage is reduced to 0, the adept catches the missile if it's small enough to hold in one hand and the adept has a hand free.

trait.name: Unarmored Defense
entries: While the sentinel is wearing no armor and wielding no shield, its AC includes its Wisdom modifier.

trait.name: Unusual Nature
entries: The sentinel doesn't require food or drink.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The sentinel makes three Unarmed Strike attacks or five Dart attacks.

action.name: Unarmed Strike
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d10 + 4}) bludgeoning damage. Once per turn, the sentinel can cause one of the following additional effects (choose one or roll a {@dice d4}):

items.name: 1-2: Hold
entries: The target is {@condition grappled} (escape {@dc 17}) and is {@condition restrained} while {@condition grappled} this way. The sentinel can only use this effect if it has a hand free and can only grapple one target this way.

items.name: 3-4: Lightning Blow
entries: The target takes an additional 22 ({@damage 4d10}) lightning damage.

action.name: Dart
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 5} to hit, range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) piercing damage and 2 ({@damage 1d4}) lightning damage.

bonus.name: Sentinel Stances
entries: The sentinel enters, ends, or changes its stance. A stance ends if the sentinel is {@condition incapacitated} or the sentinel enters another stance. Each stance has its own magical effect:

items.name: Canyon Leap
items.entry: The sentinel's long jump is up to 40 feet and its high jump is up to 20 feet, with or without a running start.

items.name: Cliff Stride
items.entry: The sentinel gains a climb speed equal to its walking speed, and can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

items.name: Stone Serenity
items.entry: The sentinel cannot be knocked {@condition prone} or moved from its space against its will.

bonus.name: Step of the Wind
entries: The sentinel takes the Dash or Disengage action.

trait.name: Evasion
entries: If the master is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the master instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the saving throw and only half damage if it fails, provided the master isn't {@condition incapacitated}.

trait.name: Ki-Empowered Strikes
entries: The master's unarmed strikes are magical.

trait.name: Unarmored Defense
entries: While the master is wearing no armor and wielding no shield, its AC includes its Wisdom modifier.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The master makes four Unarmed strike attacks or five Dart attacks.

action.name: Unarmed Strike
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 1d10 + 5}) bludgeoning damage and the master can cause one of the following additional effects (choose one or roll a {@dice d6}):

items.name: 1-2: Hold
entries: The target is {@condition grappled} (escape {@dc 16}) and is {@condition restrained} while {@condition grappled} this way. The master can only use this effect if it has a hand free.

items.name: 3-4: Throw
entries: The target must succeed on a {@dc 16} Dexterity saving throw or be pushed up to 10 feet directly away from the master and knocked {@condition prone}.

items.name: 5-6: Nerve Strike
entries: The target must succeed on a {@dc 16} Constitution saving throw or drop one item of the master's choice that it is holding and only be allowed to take one action or one bonus action on its next turn, not both.

action.name: Dart
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 5} to hit, range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d6 + 5}) piercing damage.

bonus.name: Patient Defense {@recharge 4}
entries: The master takes the Dodge action.

bonus.name: Step of the Wind {@recharge 4}
entries: The master takes the Dash or Disengage action.

bonus.name: Stunning Strike {@recharge 4}
entries: If the next unarmed strike the master makes this turn after taking this bonus action hits a creature, instead of causing an additional effect, the master can force the target to succeed on a {@dc 16} Constitution saving throw or be {@condition stunned} until the end of the master's next turn.

reaction.name: Reflect Missile
entries: In response to being hit by a ranged weapon attack, the master deflects the missile. The damage it takes from the attack is reduced by {@dice 1d10 + 15}. If the damage is reduced to 0, the master catches the missile if it's small enough to hold in one hand and the master has a hand free. The master can then make a Dart attack as part of this same reaction, using the caught missile as the dart.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Psionics)
headerEntries: The empath casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}):

trait.name: Psychic Defense
entries: While the empath is wearing no armor and wielding no shield, its AC includes its Wisdom modifier.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The empath makes two Dissipating Touch or Mind Strike attacks.

action.name: Dissipating Touch
entries: {@atk ms} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}32 ({@damage 5d12}) force damage.

action.name: Mind Strike
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., one target. {@h}27 ({@damage 5d10}) psychic damage.

action.name: Malice Feedback (5th-Level Spell; Psionic; 1/Day)
entries: The empath causes hostility to turn back on itself for as long as it concentrates (as though on a spell), for up to 10 minutes. For the duration, a 20- foot-radius circle centered around the empath darkens slightly whenever a creature that means the empath or its allies harm is in the area. Such creatures must make a {@dc 15} Charisma saving throw the first time on a turn it enters the area or start its turn there. On a failed saving throw, the creature takes 22 ({@damage 4d10}) psychic damage and its speed is halved until the start of its next turn. On a successful saving throw, the creature takes half as much damage.

monster.name: Lurk
languages: Thieves' cant plus any two languages

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Psionics)
headerEntries: The lurk casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

trait.name: Psychic Ammunition
entries: When the lurk fires its crossbow, it creates bolts of pure psychic energy, ignoring the weapon's loading property. This also grants the lurk a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with its crossbow (included in the attack)

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Lurk makes two Hand Crossbow attacks.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) piercing damage plus 17 ({@damage 5d6}) psychic damage.

action.name: Hand Crossbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 7} to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. {@h}25 ({@damage 6d6 + 4}) psychic damage.

bonus.name: Dimension Step (2nd-Level Spell; Psionic; 2/Day)
entries: The lurk and all equipment it is wearing or carrying teleports to an unoccupied space it can see within 30 feet of it.

bonus.name: Speed of Thought
entries: The lurk takes the Dash action.

trait.name: Psychic Defense
entries: While the adept is wearing no armor and wielding no shield, its AC includes its Wisdom modifier.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The adept makes two Mindblade attacks.

action.name: Mindblade
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/90 ft., one target. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) psychic damage.

reaction.name: Impossible Dodge (3rd-Level Spell; Psionic; 3/Day)
entries: When the adept is hit by an attack, it can cause the attack to miss instead.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Psionics)
headerEntries: The empath casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 12}):

trait.name: Psychic Defense
entries: While the empath is wearing no armor and wielding no shield, its AC includes its Wisdom modifier.

action.name: Mind Strike
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., one target. {@h}22 ({@damage 4d10}) psychic damage.

bonus.name: Destiny Dissonance (2nd-Level Spell; Psionic; 1/Day)
entries: The mystic telepathically reveals a glimpse of every possible future of a creature it can see within 60 feet of it, overwhelming the creature's mind. The target must succeed on a {@dc 12} Wisdom saving throw or be {@condition paralyzed} for as long as the mystic concentrates, up to 1 minute. A creature immune to being {@condition charmed} or whose thoughts cannot be read automatically succeeds on the saving throw.
Whenever the target takes damage, it can repeat the saving throw, ending the effect on a success.

reaction.name: Defensive Precognition (1st-Level Spell; Psionic; 2/Day)
entries: When the mystic fails a saving throw or is hit by an attack roll, it either gains a +3 bonus to saving throws or to its AC until the start of its next turn, which can cause the triggering saving throw to succeed or triggering attack roll to miss.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Psionics)
headerEntries: The psion casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

trait.name: Inertial Armor
entries: While the psion is conscious, its AC cannot be lower than 13 plus its proficiency bonus.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The psion makes two Energy Ray attacks. It can give up one of these attacks to use its Spellcasting action.

action.name: Energy Ray
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 90 ft., one target. {@h}21 ({@damage 6d6}) damage of a type chosen by the psion: cold, fire, lightning, or thunder.

action.name: Telekinetic Wave (5th-Level Spell; Psionic; 2/Day)
entries: The psion sends forth visible waves of crushing telekinetic force from its brow, extending out into a 40-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a {@dc 14} Constitution saving throw, taking 45 ({@damage 10d8}) force damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. Creatures who fail their save are also pushed 10 feet directly away from the psion.

reaction.name: Psionic Negation (3rd-Level Spell; Psionic; 3/Day)
entries: The psion targets one creature it can see within 90 feet of it that is casting a spell. The target must make a spellcasting ability check against a DC equal to 10 + the spell's level. On a failure, the target's spell fails and has no effect.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Psionics)
headerEntries: The psion casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 17}):

trait.name: Inertial Armor
entries: While the psion is conscious, its AC cannot be lower than 13 plus its proficiency bonus.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The psion has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The psion makes four Energy Ray attacks. It can give up two of these attacks to use its Spellcasting action.

action.name: Energy Ray
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 90 ft., one target. {@h}21 ({@damage 6d6}) damage of a type chosen by the psion: cold, fire, lightning, or thunder.

action.name: Telepathic Blast (7th-Level Spell; Psionic; 2/Day)
entries: Each creature within a 60-foot cone projected from the psion must succeed on a {@dc 17} Wisdom saving throw or take 55 ({@damage 10d10}) psychic damage and be {@condition stunned} for 1 minute. A target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

reaction.name: Prime Manifestation {@recharge 5}
entries: When the psion forces a creature to make a saving throw to resist an effect, the psion can impose disadvantage on the creature's saving throw.

reaction.name: Psionic Negation (3rd-Level Spell; Psionic; 3/Day)
entries: The psion targets one creature it can see within 90 feet of it that is casting a spell. The target must make a spellcasting ability check against a DC equal to 10 + the spell's level. On a failure, the target's spell fails and has no effect.

trait.name: Battle Trance
entries: The psychic warrior cannot suffer disadvantage when making a melee weapon attack.

trait.name: Psychokinetic Weapons
entries: The psychic warrior's weapon attacks are magical and include a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The psychic warrior makes two Glaive attacks.

action.name: Glaive
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d10 + 4}) slashing damage.

action.name: Jump (Psionic; At-Will)
entries: The psychic warrior casts the {@spell jump} spell, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability.

reaction.name: Enmity Feedback (2nd-Level Spell; Psionic; 3/Day)
entries: When the psychic warrior is damaged by a creature within 60 feet of it that it can see, the creature must make a {@dc 14} Wisdom saving throw, taking 16 ({@damage 3d10}) psychic damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Psionics)
headerEntries: The soulknife casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 17}):

trait.name: Psychic Defense
entries: While the soulknife is wearing no armor and wielding no shield, its AC includes its Wisdom modifier.

trait.name: Duodimensional Mindblades
entries: The soulknife scores a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20 when making mindblade attacks.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The soulknife makes four Mindblade attacks.

action.name: Mindblade
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/90 ft., one target. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) damage of a type chosen by the soulknife: necrotic, psychic, or radiant.

action.name: Bladestorm (5th-Level Spell; Psionic; 2/Day)
entries: The soulknife targets up to 4 creatures within 20 feet of itself, then launches into a hurricane of teleporting attacks, seemingly fragmenting itself into duplicates before reappearing in the space it was occupied when it took this action. The soulknife makes two melee attacks with its mindblade against each target.

reaction.name: Impossible Dodge (3rd-Level Spell; Psionic; 3/Day)
entries: When the soulknife is hit by an attack, it can cause the attack to miss instead.
