action.name: Mind Strike
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d10}) psychic damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Psionics)
headerEntries: The savant casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 12}):

action.name: Mind Strike
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d10}) psychic damage.

action.name: Telekinetic Lance (1st-Level Spell; Psionic; 2/Day)
entries: The savant sends a bolt of pure kinetic force plowing away from it in a line 30 feet long and 5 feet wide. Each creature in the area must make a {@dc 12} Strength saving throw, taking 7 ({@damage 2d6}) force damage and being knocked {@condition prone} on a failed save, or taking half as much damage and not being knocked {@condition prone} on a successful one.

trait.name: Mountain Born
entries: The nomad has advantage on {@skill Athletics} checks made to traverse mountainous terrain. Additionally, it is naturally acclimated to high altitudes, including elevations above 20,000 feet.

trait.name: Powerful Build
entries: The nomad counts as one size larger for the purposes of grappling and other effects that rely on size.

action.name: Javelin
entries: {@atk mw,rw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d6 + 2}) piercing damage.

reaction.name: Stone's Endurance (2/Day)
entries: When the nomad takes damage, the damage is reduced by {@dice 1d12 + 2}.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The ghostwalker casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

trait.name: Mountain Born
entries: The ghostwalker has advantage on {@skill Athletics} checks made to traverse mountainous terrain. Additionally, it is naturally acclimated to high altitudes, including elevations above 20,000 feet.

trait.name: Powerful Build
entries: The ghostwalker counts as one size larger for the purposes of grappling and other effects that rely on size.

trait.name: Spirit Tongue
entries: The ghostwalker can understand and be understood by any undead, regardless of the languages it knows.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The ghostwalker makes two Spirit Grasp attacks.

action.name: Spirit Grasp
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., one target. {@h}16 ({@damage 2d12 + 3}) necrotic damage and the target's speed is reduced by 10 feet until the start of the ghostwalker's next turn.

action.name: Calm Spirit (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: The ghostwalker calls out to wayward undead and attempts to calm them so they can exist peacefully with the living. Each undead that can hear the ghostwalker within 30 feet of it must make a {@dc 13} Charisma saving throw. Evil-aligned undead have advantage on this saving throw and undead that are immune to being {@condition charmed} automatically succeed on the save. On a failed save, the undead becomes indifferent to creatures it can see that it was hostile toward. This indifference ends if the undead is attacked, harmed, or emotionally disturbed (such as by becoming {@condition charmed} or {@condition frightened}, or if it witnesses any of its allies being harmed).
Otherwise, the undead remains non-hostile indefinitely.

reaction.name: Stone's Endurance (2/Day)
entries: When the ghostwalker takes damage, the damage is reduced by {@dice 1d12 + 2}.

trait.name: Draconic Devotion
entries: While it can see an ally that is another dragonborn or a dragon, the warrior cannot be {@condition charmed} or {@condition frightened}.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (1/Day)
entries: If the warrior fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The warrior makes three attacks with its halberd.

action.name: Skysteel Halberd
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d10 + 4}) slashing damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) lightning damage. The warrior can cause the halberd to surge with lightning and the target must succeed on a {@dc 14} Constitution saving throw or else it can't take reactions until the end of the warrior's next turn. The halberd can surge in this way only once per turn.

action.name: Storm Bolt
entries: {@atk rs} {@hit 5} to hit, range 200 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 3d6}) lightning damage

action.name: Storm Breath {@recharge}
entries: The warrior exhales a black thunderhead stormcloud in a 30-foot cube originating from it. The cloud is heavily obscured and remains in the area until the end of the warrior's next turn. The cloud is not dispersed by high winds. Each creature of the warrior's choice that is in the cube when the cloud is exhaled must make a {@dc 14} Dexterity saving throw, taking 36 ({@damage 8d8}) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

monster.name: Dream Merchant
languages: Thieves' cant plus any two languages

trait.name: Keen Intuition
entries: The Dream Merchant has advantage on Wisdom ({@skill Insight}) checks to determine if a creature is being deceptive.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Dream Merchant makes one Dagger attack and one Shortsword attack.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atk mw,rw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d4 + 4}) piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) poison damage.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) piercing damage.

bonus.name: Cunning Action
entries: The Dream Merchant takes the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The Edgewalker casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability:

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The Edgewalker has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Natural Explorer
entries: The Edgewalker's movement is not impeded by nonmagical natural environments that are difficult terrain.

trait.name: Survivor
entries: The Edgewalker regains 10 hit points at the start of its turn if it has fewer than half its hit points but at least 1 hit point.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Edgewalker makes three attacks with its Shortswords, or two Longbow attacks.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) force damage.

action.name: Longbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 7} to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) piercing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) force damage.

bonus.name: Dimension Step (2nd-Level Spell; 1/Day)
entries: The Edgewalker and all equipment it is wearing or carrying teleports to an unoccupied space it can see within 30 feet of it.

trait.name: Devotion to the Unity
entries: The soldier has advantage on saving throws against being {@condition charmed} or {@condition frightened} by creatures other than changelings, Chosen, or Inspired.

trait.name: Military Tactics
entries: The soldier has advantage on attack rolls while it can see an allied creature with 30 feet of it that isn't {@condition incapacitated}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The soldier makes two attacks with a weapon it has drawn. A typical Riedran soldier is only equipped with one of the weapons below.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) slashing damage, or 7 ({@damage 1d10 + 2}) slashing damage if used with two hands.

action.name: Glaive
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d10 + 2}) slashing damage.

action.name: Longbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 4} to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) piercing damage.

trait.name: Annihilating End
entries: When the enforcer is reduced to 0 hit points, it collapses into a momentary black hole in its space. All creatures within 5 feet of the black hole must make a {@dc 12} Strength saving throw or take 4 force damage. If a creature is left with 0 hp after taking this damage, it is drawn into the black hole and is annihilated along with it, leaving behind nothing except its magic items. A creature who dies this way can't be revived by any means short of a {@spell wish} spell.

trait.name: Enlightened Nihilism
entries: The enforcer cannot have the results of any attack roll, ability check, or saving throw it makes reduced or increased as the result of an extra die roll (such as from the {@spell bane} spell, or Bardic Inspiration).

trait.name: Slayer
entries: In the first round of a combat, the enforcer has advantage on attack rolls against any creature that hasn't taken a turn yet. If the enforcer hits a creature that round that was {@status surprised}, the hit is automatically a critical hit.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The enforcer makes two weapon attacks. If it has both its Scimitar and a Dagger drawn, it may make a third melee attack with a Dagger.

action.name: Scimitar
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) slashing damage.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atk mw,rw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., or range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) piercing damage, or 8 ({@damage 2d4 + 3}) piercing damage if used to make a melee attack.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The mastermind casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 14}, {@hit 6} to hit with spell attacks):

trait.name: Annihilating End
entries: When the mastermind is reduced to 0 hit points, it collapses into a momentary black hole in its space. All creatures within 5 feet of the black hole must make a {@dc 12} Strength saving throw or take 9 force damage. If a creature is left with 0 hp after taking this damage, it is drawn into the black hole and is annihilated along with it, leaving behind nothing except its magic items. A creature who dies this way can't be revived by any means short of a {@spell wish} spell.

trait.name: Chaos Magic
entries: Whenever a spell the mastermind casts deals damage of a type other than force damage, roll a {@dice d6} to determine the type of damage the spell deals instead of its normal damage type: 1) acid, 2) cold, 3) fire, 4) lightning, 5) necrotic, 6) thunder.

trait.name: Enlightened Nihilism
entries: The mastermind cannot have the results of any attack roll, ability check, or saving throw it makes reduced or increased as the result of an extra die roll (such as from the {@spell bane} spell, or Bardic Inspiration).

trait.name: Faith's Shield
entries: The mastermind's AC includes a magical +2 bonus.

action.name: Fell Power
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., one target. {@h}25 ({@damage 4d10 + 3}) damage of a type chosen by the mastermind: necrotic, poison, psychic, or radiant.

action.name: Sickening Radiance (4th-Level Spell; 1/Day)
entries: Dim, greenish light spreads within a 30-foot-radius sphere centered on a point the mastermind chooses within 120 feet. The light spreads around corners, and it lasts as long as the mastermind concentrates on the spell, up to 10 minutes.

When a creature moves into the spell's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, that creature must succeed on a {@dc 14} Constitution saving throw or take 22 ({@damage 4d10}) radiant damage, and it suffers one level of {@condition exhaustion} and emits a dim, greenish light in a 5-foot radius. This light makes it impossible for the creature to benefit from being {@condition invisible}. The light and any levels of {@condition exhaustion} caused by this spell go away when the spell ends.

monster.name: Swarm Dromite
languages: understands Dromite but can't speak; telepathy 120 ft.

trait.name: Mind of the Swarm
entries: The swarm dromite is psychically linked to all other swarm dromites, constantly sensing what all other swarm dromites sense and thinking what all other swarm dromites think.

A swarm dromite can't be {@status surprised} unless all swarm dromites are {@status surprised}. A swarm dromite is immune to any effect that would sense its emotions or read its thoughts, as well as to all divination spells, unless those effects or spells are used by Valaara, the Crawling Queen.

trait.name: Psychic Defense
entries: While the swarm dromite is wearing no armor and wielding no shield, its AC includes its Charisma modifier.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The swarm dromite can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The swarm dromite makes three Mind Strike attacks.

action.name: Mind Strike
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., one target. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d10}) psychic damage.

monster.name: Colony of Swarm Dromites
languages: understands Dromite but can't speak; telepathy 120 ft.

trait.name: Aura of Crushing Thoughts
entries: Each creature of the colony's choice that starts its turn within 10 feet of the colony must make a {@dc 16} Charisma saving throw, taking 26 ({@damage 4d12}) psychic damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one. This damage can't reduce a target's hit points below 1. If the target fails the saving throw, its hit point maximum is reduced for 1 hour by an amount equal to the psychic damage it took. Any effect that imparts immunity to psychic damage allows a creature's hit point maximum to return to normal before that time passes.

trait.name: Mind of the Swarm
entries: The colony of swarm dromites is psychically linked to all other swarm dromites, constantly sensing what all other swarm dromites sense and thinking what all other swarm dromites think.

The colony can't be {@status surprised} unless all swarm dromites are {@status surprised}. The colony is immune to any effect that would sense its emotions or read its thoughts, as well as to all divination spells, unless those effects or spells are used by Valaara, the Crawling Queen.

trait.name: Psychic Defense
entries: The AC of the colony includes its Charisma modifier.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The colony can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Swarm
entries: The colony can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the colony can move through any opening large enough a Small humanoid can. The colony can't regain hit points or gain temporary hit points.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The colony of swarm dromites makes a Grasping Limbs attack against each creature in its space and reach.

action.name: Grasping Limbs
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 2d4}) bludgeoning damage and the target is {@condition grappled} (escape {@dc 18}). The colony can choose to deal no damage with this attack.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting

action.name: Multiattack

action.name: Eldritch Power
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 300 ft., one target. {@h}25 ({@damage 4d10 + 3}) damage of a type chosen by the heir: necrotic, force, psychic, or radiant.

action.name: Circle of Death (6th-Level Spell; 1/Day)
entries: A sphere of negative energy ripples out in a 60-foot-radius sphere from a point within 150 feet of the heir. Each creature in that area must make a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw. A target takes 28 ({@damage 8d6}) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

reaction.name: Arcane Shield (1st-Level Spell; 3/Day)
entries: When the heir is hit by an attack roll, its AC increases by 5 until the start of its next turn, which can cause the triggering attack roll to miss.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The shadow lord casts one of the following spells, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 18}):

1e: {@spell circle of death} (cast at 9th level; see above)

trait.name: Arcane Secrets
entries: The shadow lord can concentrate on up to two spells at once.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The shadow lord has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (2/Day)
entries: If the shadow lord fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The shadow lord makes four Eldritch Power attacks.
Alternatively, it may use Spellcasting and make two Eldritch Power attacks.

action.name: Eldritch Power
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 300 ft., one target. {@h}27 ({@damage 4d10 + 5}) damage of a type chosen by the shadow lord: necrotic, force, psychic, or radiant.

action.name: Circle of Death (9th-Level Spell; 1/Day)
entries: A sphere of negative energy ripples out in a 60-foot-radius sphere from a point within 150 feet of the shadow lord. Each creature in that area must make a {@dc 18} Constitution saving throw. A target takes 49 ({@damage 14d6}) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

reaction.name: Arcane Shield (1st-Level Spell; 3/Day)
entries: When the shadow lord is hit by an attack roll, its AC increases by 5 until the start of its next turn, which can cause the triggering attack roll to miss.

reaction.name: Arcane Negation (3rd-Level Spell; 3/Day)
entries: The shadow lord targets one creature it can see within 60 feet of it that is casting a spell. The shadow lord makes an Intelligence check with a DC equal to 10 + the spell's level. On a success, the target's spell fails and has no effect.

trait.name: Dual Mind
entries: Aykuar has advantage on all Wisdom saving throws.

trait.name: Duodimensional Mindblades
entries: Aykuar scores a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20 when making mindblade attacks.

trait.name: Evasion
entries: If Aykuar is subjected to an effect that allows him to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, Aykuar instead takes no damage if he succeeds on the saving throw and only half damage if he fails, provided he isn't {@condition incapacitated}.

trait.name: Ki-Empowered Strikes
entries: Aykuar's unarmed strikes are magical.

trait.name: Psychic Defense
entries: While Aykuar is wearing no armor and wielding no shield, his AC includes his Wisdom modifier.

trait.name: Severed from Dreams
entries: Aykuar is immune to the {@spell dream} spell and other effects that require him to dream.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Aykuar makes four attacks, any of which can be either a Mindblade attack or an Unarmed Strike.

action.name: Mindblade
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60/180 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) psychic damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) radiant damage.

action.name: Unarmed Strike
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 1d10 + 5}) bludgeoning damage and Aykuar can cause one of the following additional effects (choose one or roll a {@dice d6}):

items.name: 1-2: Hold
entries: The target is {@condition grappled} (escape {@dc 17}) and is {@condition restrained} while {@condition grappled} this way. Aykuar can only use this effect if he has a hand free.

items.name: 3-4: Throw
entries: The target must succeed on a {@dc 17} Dexterity saving throw or be pushed up to 10 feet directly away from Aykuar and knocked {@condition prone}.

items.name: 5-6: Nerve Strike
entries: The target must succeed on a {@dc 17} Constitution saving throw or drop one item of Aykuar's choice that it is holding and only be allowed to take one action or one bonus action on its next turn, not both.

bonus.name: Five Fingers Fells the Oak {@recharge 5}
entries: If the next unarmed strike Aykuar makes this turn after taking this bonus action hits a creature, instead of causing an additional effect, Aykuar can force the target to make a {@dc 17} Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the target's current and maximum hit points are reduced by 30 at the start of each of its turns. If this reduces the target's maximum hit points to zero, the target dies. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, stopping the continuing reduction on a success, but not restoring its maximum hit points. This reduction lasts until the target's hit point maximum is restored by a {@spell greater restoration} spell or similar magic.

bonus.name: Step of the Mind {@recharge 4}
entries: Aykuar and all equipment he is wearing or carrying teleports to an unoccupied space he can see within 60 feet of him.

bonus.name: Patient Defense {@recharge 4}
entries: Aykuar takes the Dodge action.

reaction.name: Impossible Dodge (3rd-Level Spell; Psionic; 3/Day)
entries: When Aykuar is hit by an attack, he can cause the attack to miss instead.

action.name: Mind Strike
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., one target. {@h}22 ({@damage 4d10}) psychic damage.

action.name: Crushing Telepathic Presence {@recharge}
entries: Each other creature within 120 feet of Thatari must make a {@dc 19} Wisdom saving throw. On a failed saving throw, a creature takes 54 ({@damage 12d8}) psychic damage and is {@condition incapacitated} and has its speed halved until the end of Thatari's next turn. On a successful saving throw, a creature takes half as much damage and suffers no further effect.

bonus.name: Project Quori Spirit
entries: A ghostly manifestation of Thatari's hashalaq quori spirit emerges from her and approaches one target Thatari can see within 60 feet of her. It then vanishes after making the following attack:

{@atk ms} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}16 ({@damage 2d10 + 5}) force damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a {@dc 19} Wisdom saving throw or fall {@condition prone} in a fit of bliss or laughter.

reaction.name: Prime Manifestation {@recharge 5}
entries: When Thatari forces a creature to make a saving throw to resist an effect, she can impose disadvantage on the creature's saving throw.

reaction.name: Psionic Negation (3rd-Level Spell; Psionic; 3/Day)
entries: Thatari targets one creature she can see within 90 feet of her that is casting a spell. The target must make a spellcasting ability check against a DC equal to 10 + the spell's level. On a failure, the target's spell fails and has no effect.

legendary.name: Spatial Transposition
entries: Thatari, one creature she touches, and all equipment they are wearing and carrying teleport to unoccupied spaces within reach of each other that Thatari can see within 30 feet of her. If the creature Thatari touches is unwilling to teleport, it may make a {@dc 19} Charisma saving throw. On a successful saving throw, the creature doesn't teleport.

legendary.name: Psychic Assault (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Thatari makes three Mind Strike attacks.

legendary.name: Mind Over Matter (Costs 3 Actions)
entries: Thatari uses her Spellcasting action.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Psionics)
headerEntries: Vonishana casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 17}):
footerEntries: * Vonishana casts foresight on themself before combat.

trait.name: Discern Deceit
entries: Vonishana knows when they are being lied to or otherwise deceived via telepathic communication.

trait.name: Dual Mind
entries: Vonishana has advantage on all Wisdom saving throws.

trait.name: Inertial Armor
entries: While Vonishana is conscious, their AC cannot be lower than 13 plus their proficiency bonus.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Vonishana has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Severed from Dreams
entries: Vonishana is immune to the {@spell dream} spell and other effects that require them to dream.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Vonishana makes four Mind Strike attacks. They can give up two of these attacks to use their Spellcasting action.

action.name: Mind Strike
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., one target. {@h}22 ({@damage 4d10}) psychic damage.

action.name: Telepathic Blast (7th-Level Spell; Psionic; 2/Day)
entries: Each creature within a 60-foot cone projected from Vonishana must succeed on a {@dc 17} Wisdom saving throw or take 55 ({@damage 10d10}) psychic damage and be {@condition stunned} for 1 minute. A target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

bonus.name: Project Quori Spirit
entries: A ghostly manifestation of Vonishana's usvapna quori spirit emerges from them and approaches one target Vonishana can see within 60 feet of them. It then vanishes after making the following attack: Melee Spell Attack: {@hit 10} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}18 ({@damage 2d12 + 5}) force damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a {@dc 17} Charisma save. On a failure, the creature is {@condition incapacitated} for 1 round while its mind is filled with doubt and it hears thoughts of self-loathing.

reaction.name: Prime Manifestation {@recharge 5}
entries: When Vonishana forces a creature to make a saving throw to resist an effect, Vonishana can impose disadvantage on the creature's saving throw.

reaction.name: Psionic Negation (3rd-Level Spell; Psionic; 3/Day)
entries: Vonishana targets one creature they can see within 90 feet of them that is casting a spell. The target must make a spellcasting ability check against a DC equal to 10 + the spell's level. On a failure, the target's spell fails and has no effect.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Psionics)
headerEntries: Luunkashtai casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability:

trait.name: Battle Trance
entries: Luunkashtai cannot suffer disadvantage when making a melee weapon attack.

trait.name: Dual Mind
entries: Luunkashtai has advantage on all Wisdom saving throws.

trait.name: Evasion
entries: If Luunkashtai is subjected to an effect that allows her to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, she instead takes no damage if she succeeds on the saving throw and only half damage if she fails, provided Luunkashtai isn't {@condition incapacitated}.

trait.name: Psychokinetic Strikes
entries: Luunkashtai's unarmed strikes and weapon attacks are magical and include a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

trait.name: Psychic Defense
entries: While Luunkashtai is wearing no armor and wielding no shield, her AC includes her Wisdom modifier.

trait.name: Severed from Dreams
entries: Luunkashtai is immune to the {@spell dream} spell and other effects that require her to dream.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Luunkashtai makes four attacks, any of which can be an Unarmed Strike or Glaive attack. Alternatively, she can make five Mind Strike attacks.

action.name: Glaive
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}12 ({@damage 1d10 + 7}) slashing damage plus 5 ({@damage 1d10}) psychic damage.

action.name: Unarmed Strike
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}12 ({@damage 1d10 + 7}) bludgeoning damage and Luunkashtai can cause one of the following additional effects (choose one or roll a {@dice d6}):

items.name: 1-2: Knock Down
entries: The target must succeed on a {@dc 16} Dexterity saving throw or be knocked {@condition prone}.

items.name: 3-4: Push
entries: The target must succeed on a {@dc 16} Strength saving throw or be pushed up to 10 feet directly away from Luunkashtai.

items.name: 5-6: Disarm
entries: The target must succeed on a {@dc 16} Dexterity saving throw or drop one item of the master's choice that it is holding.

action.name: Mind Strike
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., one target. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d10}) psychic damage.

bonus.name: Patient Defense {@recharge 4}
entries: Luunkashtai takes the Dodge action.

bonus.name: Pine Endures the Seasons {@recharge 4}
entries: If Luunkashtai hits one target with at least three Glaive attacks in the same turn after taking this bonus action, the target must succeed on a {@dc 16} Charisma saving throw. On a failed saving throw, the target is shunted 1 minute forward in time, effectively disappearing from its space for 1 minute.

At the start of each of Luunkashtai's turns, the target can repeat the saving throw. On a successful subsequent save, or 1 minute after it was shunted, the target reappears in the space it was occupying when shunted, or in the nearest unoccupied space if that space is occupied.
A shunted target perceives no personal time passing between the moment it was shunted and when it reappears.

bonus.name: Step of the Mind {@recharge 4}
entries: Luunkashtai and all equipment she is wearing or carrying teleports to an unoccupied space she can see within 60 feet of her.

reaction.name: Enmity Feedback (5nd-Level Spell; Psionic; 3/Day)
entries: When the psychic warrior is damaged by a creature within 60 feet of it that it can see, the creature must make a {@dc 14} Wisdom saving throw, taking 33 ({@damage 6d10}) psychic damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Chanaakar casts one of the following spells, using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 18}):

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Psionics; Costs 2 Actions)
headerEntries: Kalaa casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 18}):
At will: detect magic, thaumaturgy
3/day each: charm person, {@spell dispel magic}, fly
2/day each: banishment, dimension door, true seeing
1/day each: dominate monster, plane shift

trait.name: Driven {@recharge}
entries: Chanaakar rerolls a failed ability check, attack roll, or saving throw with advantage.

trait.name: Metamagic (5/Day)
entries: When Chanaakar casts a spell, he can choose one of the following effects to apply to the spell he casts:

items.name: Distant Spell
entries: If the spell has a range of 5 feet or greater, the range is doubled. If the spell has a range of touch, the range becomes 30 feet.

items.name: Extend Spell
entries: If the spell has a duration of 1 minute or longer, the duration is doubled, to a maximum of 24 hours.

items.name: Subtle Spell
entries: Chanaakar can cast the spell without any somatic or verbal components.

trait.name: Unarmored Defense
entries: While Chanaakar is wearing no armor and wielding no shield, his AC includes its Wisdom modifier.

trait.name: Special Equipment
entries: Chanaakar wears a special {@item ring of mind shielding}, which makes him immune to magic that allows other creatures to read his thoughts, know if he's lying, know his alignment, or know his creature type, and creatures can telepathically communicate with Chanaakar only if he allows it.

Uniquely, the ring holds the soul of Kaala, Chanaakar's deceased companion, who can take the legendary actions listed below. If Chanaakar takes off the ring, or Kaala is restored to life, he loses these legendary actions and his challenge is reduced to 13 (10,000 XP).

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Chanaakar makes four Arcane Burst or Unarmed Strike attacks. Alternatively, he may make up to two Unarmed Strike attacks and cast a spell.

action.name: Arcane Burst
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft., one target. {@h}27 ({@damage 4d10 + 5}) damage of a type chosen by Chanaakar: acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder.

action.name: Unarmed Strike
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) bludgeoning damage and the target must succeed on a {@dc 18} Dexterity saving throw or be pushed up to 10 feet directly away from Chanaakar and knocked {@condition prone}.

bonus.name: Healing Light (3rd-Level Spell; 3/Day)
entries: Chanaakar or one creature of his choice within 60 feet of him regains 18 ({@dice 3d8 + 5}) hit points.

reaction.name: Arcane Negation (3rd-Level Spell; 3/Day)
entries: Chanaakar targets one creature he can see within 60 feet of him that is casting a spell.
Chanaakar makes an Intelligence check with a DC equal to 10 + the spell's level. On a success, the target's spell fails and has no effect.

reaction.name: Arcane Shield (1st-Level Spell; 3/Day)
entries: When Chanaakar is hit by an attack roll, his AC increases by 5 until the start of his next turn, which can cause the triggering attack roll to miss.

While Chanaakar wears his special ring of mind shielding, Kaala can briefly control his body to take 3 legendary actions, choosing from the options below. Only one legendary action option can be used at a time and only at the end of another creature's turn. Kaala regains spent legendary actions at the start of Chaanakar's turn.

legendary.name: Mind Strike
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., one target. {@h}27 ({@damage 5d10}) psychic damage.

legendary.name: Telepathic Blast (7th-Level Spell; Psionic; 1/Day; Costs 3 Actions)
entries: Each creature within a 60-foot cone projected from Chanaakar must succeed on a {@dc 17} Wisdom saving throw or take 55 ({@damage 10d10}) psychic damage and be {@condition stunned} for 1 minute. A target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Cassandra casts one of the following spells, using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 25}):

trait.name: Ancient Secrets
entries: Cassandra can maintain {@status concentration} on three spells at once, and automatically succeeds on Constitution saving throws to maintain {@status concentration} due to taking damage.

trait.name: Blind Prophet
entries: Cassandra can't be {@status surprised} by creatures within her blindsight range while she isn't {@condition incapacitated}. Additionally, she has advantage on all attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws against creatures and effects in or originating within her blindsight range.
Creatures within range of her blindsight have disadvantage on attack rolls against her.

trait.name: Immortality
entries: When Cassandra is reduced to 0 hit points or would otherwise die outright, she doesn't die. Instead, she falls into a deathless slumber from which she only awakens after {@dice 1d100} years, suffering no conditions and with all of her hit points.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If Cassandra fails a saving throw, she can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Necrotic Absorption
entries: Whenever Cassandra is subjected to necrotic damage, she takes no damage and regains a number of hit points equal to the necrotic damage dealt.

trait.name: Shroud of Souls
entries: The spirits of the dead constantly swirl around Cassandra, out to a radius of 20 feet from her. Creatures hostile to Cassandra have their speed halved in the area, and when such a creature enters the area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it must make a {@dc 25} Charisma saving throw. On a failed save, the creature takes 36 ({@damage 6d8}) necrotic damage. On a successful save, the creature takes half as much damage. Additionally, any creature that dies in the area has its soul join the spirits of the shroud. Such creatures cannot be restored to life unless Cassandra is in a deathless slumber (see Immortality) or she chooses to release the creature's captured soul.

trait.name: Turning Weakness
entries: If Cassandra is in the area of an effect that turns undead, she must make a saving throw against it as if she was a valid target of the effect. However, if she fails her saving throw, she is not turned. Instead, for the duration of the turning effect, her Shroud of Souls trait deals no damage and she cannot use her Frightful Keening and Soul Vortex legendary actions.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Cassandra makes two Greataxe attacks or uses Mortal Wounds twice. Alternatively, Cassandra may use Spellcasting in place of a Greataxe attack or one use of Mortal Wounds.

action.name: Greataxe
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 13} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}25 ({@damage 3d12 + 6}) slashing damage.

action.name: Mortal Wounds
entries: One creature Cassandra can see within 120 feet of her must make a {@dc 25} Constitution saving throw, taking 27 ({@damage 5d10}) necrotic damage on a failed save or half as much on a success.

legendary.name: Attack
entries: Cassandra makes one weapon attack.

legendary.name: Frightful Keening (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Each creature within 60 feet of Cassandra must make a {@dc 25} Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 66 ({@damage 12d10}) psychic damage and is {@condition frightened} of Cassandra for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, and is no longer {@condition frightened} on a success.

legendary.name: Soul Vortex (Costs 3 Actions)
entries: Each creature with 100 or fewer hit points in a 20-foot radius sphere centered on Cassandra must make a {@dc 25} Constitution save or instantly die.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Kalahareth casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}):

trait.name: Dual Mind
entries: Kalahareth has advantage on all Wisdom saving throws.

trait.name: Severed from Dreams
entries: Kalahareth is immune to the {@spell dream} spell and other effects that require her to dream.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Kalahareth makes two Halberd attacks, and she uses Searing Light.

action.name: Halberd
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d10 + 3}) slashing damage plus 13 ({@damage 3d8}) radiant damage.

action.name: Searing Light (1st-Level Spell; At-Will)
entries: Kalahareth targets one creature she can see within 60 feet of her. The target must make a {@dc 15} Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the target takes 12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) radiant damage, and it is {@condition blinded} until the start of Kalahareth's next turn. On a successful save, the target takes half as much damage and isn't {@condition blinded}.

bonus.name: Healing Light (2nd-Level Spell; 2/Day)
entries: Kalahareth or one creature of her choice within 60 feet of her regains 12 ({@dice 2d8 + 3}) hit points.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Nuunala casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}):

trait.name: Driven {@recharge}
entries: Nuunala rerolls a failed ability check, attack roll, or saving throw with advantage.

trait.name: Natural Explorer
entries: Nuunala's movement is not impeded by nonmagical natural environments that are difficult terrain.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Nuunala makes two attacks with her Shortswords or four Longbow attacks.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d6 + 5}) piercing damage.

action.name: Longbow
entries: {@atk rs} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 90 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) piercing damage.

action.name: Conjure Volley (5th-Level Spell; 1/Day)
entries: Nunnala fires an arrow into the sky that blossoms into a sky-darkening cloud of duplicates. The volley of arrows then descends on a point Nunnala chooses within 150 feet of her, in a 40-foot-radius, 20-foot-high cylinder. Each creature in the cylinder must make a {@dc 16} Dexterity saving throw, taking 36 ({@damage 8d8}) piercing damage on a failed save, or half as much on a success.

bonus.name: Mark Quarry (3rd-Level Spell; 2/day)
entries: Nunnala targets one creature within 60 feet of her that she can see and magically marks it as her quarry. For the next 8 hours, or until Nunnala marks another creature, her weapon attacks deal an extra 3 ({@damage 1d6}) damage to the target and she has advantage on Wisdom checks made to locate or track the target.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: Piila regains 5 hit points at the start of her turn if she has at least 1 hit point and is in contact with mountainous terrain or under the open sky.

trait.name: Scion of the Mountainsoul
entries: Piila can move across difficult terrain without expending extra movement if she is walking on the ground or floor. Additionally, she can burrow through unworked earth and stone and she doesn't disturb the material she moves through while doing so. Lastly, Piila has advantage on Dexterity ({@skill Stealth}) checks when moving stealthily through mountainous terrain.

trait.name: Unarmored Defense
entries: While Piila is wearing no armor and wielding no shield, her AC includes her Wisdom modifier.

trait.name: Unusual Nature
entries: Piila doesn't require food or drink.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Piila makes four Unarmed Strike attacks or five Dart attacks.

action.name: Unarmed Strike
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 1d12 + 4}) bludgeoning damage plus 5 ({@damage 1d10}) lightning damage. Once per turn, Piila can cause one of the following additional effects (choose one or roll a {@dice d4}):

items.name: 1-2: Hold
entries: The target is {@condition grappled} (escape {@dc 17}) and is {@condition restrained} while {@condition grappled} this way. Piila can only use this effect if she has a hand free and can only grapple one target this way.

items.name: 3-4: Throw
entries: The target must succeed on a {@dc 17} Dexterity saving throw or be pushed up to 10 feet directly away from Piila and knocked {@condition prone}.

action.name: Dart
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 6} to hit, range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) piercing damage and 5 ({@damage 1d10}) lightning damage.

action.name: Control Weather (8th-Level Spell; 1/Day)
entries: Piila casts the {@spell control weather} spell using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 17}).

bonus.name: Sentinel Stances
entries: Piila enters, ends, or changes her stance. A stance ends if Piila is {@condition incapacitated} or she enters another stance. Each stance has its own magical effect:

items.name: Canyon Leap
items.entry: Piila's long jump is up to 50 feet and her high jump is up to 25 feet, with or without a running start.

items.name: Cliff Stride
items.entry: Piila gains a climb speed equal to her walking speed, and can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

items.name: Stone Serenity
items.entry: Piila cannot be knocked {@condition prone} or moved from her space against her will.

bonus.name: Step of the Wind
entries: Piila takes the Dash or Disengage action.

trait.name: swim 40 ft
entries: (Water only) STR DEX CON INT WIS CHA 18 (+4) 15 (+2) 17 (+3) 4 (-3) 10 (+0) 16 (+3) Damage Resistances acid (Water only); lightning and thunder (Air only); piercing and slashing (Earth only) Damage Immunities poison; fire (Fire only) Condition Immunities {@condition exhaustion}, {@condition paralyzed}, {@condition petrified}, {@condition poisoned}, {@condition unconscious} Senses darkvision 60 ft., passive {@skill Perception} 10 Languages understands Dromite, Primordial, Quori, and Sarlonan, but can only speak Primordial Challenge—(included in Rin's challenge) PB +4

trait.name: Amorphous Form (Air, Fire, and Water Only)
entries: The elemental can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The elemental makes three attacks.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}16 ({@damage 1d10 + 11}) bludgeoning damage (Air, Earth, and Water only) or fire damage (Fire only).

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Psionics)
headerEntries: Chelci casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 26}):

trait.name: Gem Awakening (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: If Chelci would be reduced to 0 hit points, her current hit point total instead resets to 400 hit points, she recharges her Breath Weapon, and she regains any expended uses of Legendary Resistance. Additionally, Chelci can now use her Mass Telekinesis action during the next hour.
Award a party an additional 90,000 XP (180,000 XP total) for defeating Chelci after her Gem Awakening activates.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day)
entries: If Chelci fails a saving throw, she can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Unusual Nature
entries: Chelci doesn't require food or drink.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Chelci makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks.
Alternatively, Chelci may use Spellcasting in place of a Bite attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 17} to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. {@h}20 ({@damage 2d10 + 9}) piercing damage plus 16 ({@damage 3d10}) force damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 17} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}18 ({@damage 2d8 + 9}) slashing damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it is {@condition grappled} (escape {@dc 19}) and is {@condition restrained} until this grapple ends.
Chelci can have only one creature {@condition grappled} in this way at a time.

action.name: Breath Weapon {@recharge 5}
entries: Chelci exhales crushing force in a 300-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a {@dc 25} Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, the creature takes 71 ({@damage 11d12}) force damage and is knocked {@condition prone}. On a successful save, it takes half as much damage and isn't knocked {@condition prone}. On a success or failure, the creature's speed becomes 0 until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Mass Telekinesis (Gem Awakening Only; Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: Chelci targets any number of creatures and objects she can see within 120 feet of her. No one target can weigh more than 4,000 pounds, and objects can't be targeted if they're being worn or carried. Each targeted creature must succeed on a {@dc 26} Strength saving throw or be {@condition restrained} in Chelci telekinetic grip. At the end of a creature's turn, it can repeat the saving throw, ending the effect on itself on a success.

At the end of Chelci's turn, she can move each creature or object she has in her telekinetic grip up to 60 feet in any direction, but not beyond 120 feet of herself. In addition, she can choose any number of creatures {@condition restrained} in this way and deal 45 ({@damage 7d12}) force damage to each of them.

bonus.name: Change Shape
entries: Chelci magically transforms into any creature that is Medium or Small, while retaining her game statistics (other than her size). This transformation ends if Chelci is reduced to 0 hit points or uses a bonus action to end it.

bonus.name: Psychic Step
entries: Chelci magically teleports to an unoccupied space she can see within 60 feet of her.

legendary.name: Claw
entries: Chelci makes one Claw attack.

legendary.name: Psionics (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Chelci uses Psychic Step or Spellcasting.

legendary.name: Psychic Beam (Costs 3 Actions)
entries: Chelci emits a beam of psychic energy in a 90-foot line that is 10 feet wide. Each creature in that area must make a {@dc 26} Intelligence saving throw, taking 27 ({@damage 5d10}) psychic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Psionics)
headerEntries: Kelki casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 14}):

trait.name: Keen Insight
entries: Despite their lack of common sense, Kelki has a talented understanding of social cues and makes Wisdom ({@skill Insight}) checks with advantage.

trait.name: Inertial Armor
entries: While Kelki is conscious, their AC cannot be lower than 13 plus their proficiency bonus.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Kelki makes three Pyrokinetic Ray attacks.

action.name: Pyrokinetic Ray
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 90 ft., one target. {@h}14 ({@damage 4d6}) fire damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Psionics)
headerEntries: Murephan casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

trait.name: Aberrant Nature
entries: Murephan doesn't require sleep and cannot be magically aged or put to sleep.

trait.name: Inertial Armor
entries: While Murephan is conscious, his AC cannot be lower than 13 plus his proficiency bonus.

trait.name: Psychokinetic Weapons
entries: Murephan's weapon attacks are magical and include a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

trait.name: Natural Explorer
entries: Murephan's movement is not impeded by nonmagical natural environments that are difficult terrain.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Murephan makes three attacks with his Shortswords or two Energy Ray attacks.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d6 + 5}) piercing damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) psychic damage.

action.name: Energy Ray
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 90 ft., one target. {@h}14 ({@damage 4d6}) damage of a type chosen by Murephan: cold, fire, lightning, or thunder.

bonus.name: Speed of Thought
entries: Murephan takes the Dash action.

reaction.name: Psychic Deflection (3/Day)
entries: When Murephan takes damage, he can reduce it by 9 ({@dice 1d12 + 3}).

trait.name: Aura of Devotion
entries: All allies within 60 feet of Tolmarek are immune to being {@condition charmed} and {@condition frightened}. Additionally, Tolmarek and allies within 60 feet of him have advantage on all Wisdom saving throws.
The aura exists as long as Tolmarek is conscious.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (2/Day)
entries: If Tolmarek fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Survivor
entries: Tolmarek regains 10 hit points at the start of his turn if he has fewer than half his hit points but at least 1 hit point.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Tolmarek makes three Skysteel Greatsword attacks or two Storm Bolt attacks.

action.name: Skysteel Greatsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) slashing damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) lightning damage. Once per turn, Tolmarek can deal an additional 13 ({@damage 3d8}) radiant damage. If the target is an aberration or fiend, the extra radiant damage increases by 9 ({@dice 2d8}).

action.name: Storm Bolt
entries: {@atk rs} {@hit 10} to hit, range 200 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 3d6}) lightning damage

action.name: Storm Breath {@recharge 5}
entries: Tolmarek exhales a black thunderhead stormcloud in a 30-foot cube originating from him. The cloud is heavily obscured and remains in the area until the end of Tolmarek's next turn. The cloud is not dispersed by high winds. Each creature of Tolmarek's choice that is in the cube when the cloud is exhaled must make a {@dc 16} Dexterity saving throw, taking 45 ({@damage 10d8}) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

legendary.name: Command Ally
entries: Tolmarek targets one ally he can see within 30 feet of him. If the target can see or hear Tolmarek, the target can make one weapon attack as a reaction and gains advantage on the attack roll.

legendary.name: Dragonfear
entries: Tolmarek targets one creature he can see within 30 feet of him. If the target can see or hear him, the target must succeed on a {@dc 16} Wisdom saving throw or be {@condition frightened} of Tolmarek until the end of his next turn.

legendary.name: Smite of Siberys (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Tolmarek makes one Skysteel Greatsword attack with advantage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Psionics)
headerEntries: Viinte casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

trait.name: Keen Intuition
entries: Viinte has advantage on Wisdom ({@skill Insight}) checks to determine if a creature is being deceptive.

trait.name: Psychic Ammunition
entries: When Viinte fires their crossbow, they create bolts of pure psychic energy, ignoring the weapon's loading property. This also grants Viinte a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with their crossbow (included in the attack)

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Viinte makes two mindblade attacks or three hand crossbow attacks. Alternatively, they may make one mindblade or hand crossbow attack and use Spellcasting.

action.name: Mindblade
entries: {@atk ms} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/90 ft., one target. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) psychic damage.

action.name: Hand Crossbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 8} to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. {@h}26 ({@damage 6d6 + 5}) psychic damage.

bonus.name: Change Appearance
entries: Viinte transforms into a Medium humanoid they have seen, or back into their true form. Viinte's statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment they are wearing or carrying isn't transformed. Viinte reverts to their true form if they die.
Cunning Action Viinte takes the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.

reaction.name: Uncanny Dodge
entries: Viinte halves the damage that they take from an attack that hits them. Viinte must be able to see the attacker.

monster.name: Wyndyrgha
languages: but can't physically speak; telepathy 120 ft.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Wyndyrgha casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 17}):

trait.name: Aberrant Nature
entries: Wyndyrgha doesn't require sleep and cannot be magically aged or put to sleep.

trait.name: Inertial Armor
entries: While Wyndyrgha is conscious, her AC cannot be lower than 13 plus her proficiency bonus.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Wyndyrgha makes three Staff or Withering attacks. She can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

action.name: Staff
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) bludgeoning damage plus 21 ({@damage 6d6}) poison damage.

action.name: Withering
entries: {@atk rs} {@hit 9} to hit, range 120 ft., one target. {@h}26 ({@damage 6d6 + 5}) necrotic damage, and the target deals half damage with weapon attacks until the start of Wyndyrgha's next turn.

action.name: Telekinetic Wave (5th-Level Spell; Psionic; 2/Day)
entries: Wyndyrgha sends forth visible waves of crushing telekinetic force from her brow, extending out into a 40-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a {@dc 17} Constitution saving throw, taking 45 ({@damage 10d8}) force damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
Creatures who fail their save are also pushed 10 feet directly away from Wyndyrgha.

bonus.name: Wild Shape (3/Day)
entries: Wyndyrgha magically polymorphs into a beast with a challenge rating of 2 or less, and can remain in this form for up to 9 hours. Wyndyrgha can choose whether her equipment falls to the ground, melds with her new form, or is worn by the new form. She reverts to her true form if she dies or falls {@condition unconscious}. She can revert to her true form using a bonus action on her turn.

While in a new form, Wyndyrgha's statistics are replaced by the stat block of that form, except she keeps her alignment, her Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma scores, her current hit points, her hit point maximum, the ability to speak telepathically, and this bonus action.

reaction.name: Psychic Deflection (4/Day)
entries: When Wyndyrgha takes damage, she can reduce it by 10 ({@dice 1d12 + 4}).

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Yuzden casts one of the following spells, using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 17}):

trait.name: Annihilating End
entries: When Yuzden is reduced to 0 hit points, he collapses into a momentary black hole in his space. All creatures within 15 feet of the black hole must make a {@dc 14} Strength saving throw or take 16 force damage. If a creature is left with 0 hp after taking this damage, it is drawn into the black hole and is annihilated along with it, leaving behind nothing except its magic items. A creature who dies this way can't be revived by any means short of a {@spell wish} spell.

trait.name: Devil's Sight
entries: Magical darkness doesn't impede Yuzen's darkvision.

trait.name: Driven {@recharge}
entries: Yuzden rerolls a failed ability check, attack roll, or saving throw with advantage.

trait.name: Enlightened Nihilism
entries: Yuzden cannot have the results of any attack roll, ability check, or saving throw he makes reduced or increased as the result of an extra die roll (such as from the {@spell bane} spell, or Bardic Inspiration).

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: Yuzden regains 10 hit points at the start of his turn if he has at least 1 hit point.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Yuzden makes three Fell Power attacks.

action.name: Fell Power
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., one target. {@h}16 ({@damage 2d10 + 5}) force damage and 9 ({@damage 2d8}) necrotic damage.

bonus.name: Khyber's Hex
entries: Yuzden places a curse on a creature he can see within 90 feet of him. Yuzden chooses an ability score and the target has disadvantage on ability checks and saving throws with that ability for the duration of the curse. The curse lasts for 1 hour, or until Yuzden curses another target. A {@spell remove curse} spell or similar magic cast on the target ends this curse early.

reaction.name: Arcane Negation (3rd-Level Spell; 3/Day)
entries: Yuzden targets one creature he can see within 60 feet of him that is casting a spell. Yuzden makes a Charisma check with a DC equal to 10 + the spell's level. On a success, the target's spell fails and has no effect.

trait.name: Assassinate
entries: During her first turn in a combat, Devotion has advantage on attack rolls against any creature that hasn't taken a turn. Any hit Devotion scores against a {@status surprised} creature is a critical hit.

trait.name: Devotion Embodied
entries: Devotion immune to being {@condition charmed} or {@condition frightened} by creatures other than Chosen or Inspired.

trait.name: Evasion
entries: If Devotion is subjected to an effect that allows her to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, she instead takes no damage if she succeeds on the saving throw and only half damage if she fails, provided Devotion isn't {@condition incapacitated}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Devotion makes three Shortsword or Shortbow attacks.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) poison damage.

action.name: Shortbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 7} to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) poison damage.

bonus.name: Change Appearance
entries: Devotion transforms into a Medium humanoid she has seen, or back into her true form. Devotion's statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment she is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. Devotion reverts to her true form if she dies.

bonus.name: Cunning Action
entries: Devotion takes the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.

reaction.name: Uncanny Dodge
entries: Devotion halves the damage that she takes from an attack that hits her. Devotion must be able to see the attacker.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Haurungad casts one of the following spells using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}):

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Haurungad makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}17 ({@damage 2d10 + 6}) piercing damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d6 + 6}) slashing damage.

action.name: Breath Weapon {@recharge 5}
entries: Haurungad uses one of the following breath weapons.

action.name: Cold Breath
entries: Haurungad exhales an icy blast in a 30-foot cone.
Each creature in that area must make a {@dc 17} Constitution saving throw, taking 54 ({@damage 12d8}) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

action.name: Paralyzing Breath
entries: Haurungad exhales paralyzing gas in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a {@dc 17} Constitution saving throw or be {@condition paralyzed} for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

bonus.name: Change Shape
entries: Haurungad magically transforms into any creature that is Medium or Small, while retaining his game statistics (other than his size). This transformation ends if Haurungad is reduced to 0 hit points or uses a bonus action to end it.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Psionics)
headerEntries: Kaltaresh casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 21}):

trait.name: Aura of Fury
entries: Any creature of Kaltaresh's choice that enters a space within 60 of him, or starts its turn there, must succeed on a {@dc 21} Wisdom saving throw or become enraged for 1 minute. During that time, the enraged target has advantage on all melee attack rolls, and all attack rolls made against that target have advantage. An enraged target is subject to Kaltaresh's Impervious Fury reaction and Anger Pulse legendary action.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If Kaltaresh fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Kaltaresh has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Nightmare Awareness
entries: Kaltaresh can't be {@status surprised} while he isn't {@condition incapacitated}. Additionally, magical darkness doesn't impede Kaltaresh's darkvision, and magic can't put him to sleep.

trait.name: Track Hatred
entries: When Kaltaresh deals damage to any creature, he forms a psychic link with the target for 24 hours. During that time, Kaltaresh has advantage on Wisdom ({@skill Survival}) checks to track the target. Kaltaresh can attempt to track the target at any range, even if it is on another plane of existence, and abilities such as the {@spell pass without trace} spell or the ranger's Vanish feature do not impede Kaltaresh's ability to track his target. Even when Kaltaresh is tracking while traveling, he remains alert to danger.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Kaltaresh makes three Tentacle attacks.

action.name: Tentacle
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 14} to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. {@h}19 ({@damage 3d8 + 6}) bludgeoning damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) fire damage, and the target is {@condition grappled} (escape {@dc 23}). Until this grapple ends, the target takes 13 ({@damage 3d8}) fire damage and 13 ({@damage 3d8}) psychic damage at the start of each of Kaltaresh's turns, and Kaltaresh can't use that tentacle against a different target. Kaltaresh has three tentacles.

action.name: Possession {@recharge}
entries: One humanoid that Kaltaresh can see within 15 feet of him must succeed on a {@dc 21} Charisma saving throw or be possessed by him; Kaltaresh then disappears, and the target is {@condition incapacitated} and loses control of its body. Kaltaresh now controls the body but doesn't deprive the target of awareness. Kaltaresh can't be targeted by any attack, spell, or other effect, except ones that turn fiends, and he retains his alignment, Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma, and immunity to being {@condition charmed} and {@condition frightened}. He otherwise uses the possessed target's statistics, but doesn't gain access to the target's knowledge, class features, or proficiencies.

The possession lasts until the body drops to 0 hit points, Kaltaresh ends it as a bonus action, or he is turned or forced out by an effect like the {@spell dispel evil and good} spell. When the possession ends, Kaltaresh reappears in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the body. The target is immune to Kaltaresh's Possession for 24 hours after succeeding on the saving throw or after the possession ends.

bonus.name: Recall Agony {@recharge 5}
entries: Kaltaresh makes a creature recall the most agonizing moments of its past—or future. One creature within 60 feet of Kaltaresh must make a {@dc 21} Wisdom saving throw, taking 67 ({@damage 15d8}) psychic damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

reaction.name: Impervious Fury
entries: When an enraged creature targets Kaltaresh with an attack or spell, Kaltaresh can feed on and control the creature's rage. Kaltaresh's AC increases by 5 until the start of his next turn, and he can cause the enraged creature to instead target another creature of his choice within range.

legendary.name: Anger Pulse
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 14} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft., one enraged target. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d10}) fire damage and 11 ({@damage 2d10}) psychic damage.

legendary.name: Manifest Nightmare (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Kaltaresh uses Spellcasting.

legendary.name: Storm of Fury (Costs 3 Actions)
entries: Kaltaresh causes pure rage and anger to ignite the air in sheets of roaring, psychic flame, filling up to ten 10-foot cubes within 150 of him. Kaltaresh can arrange the cubes as he wishes, so long as each cube has at least one face adjacent to the face of another cube. Each creature in a cube must make a {@dc 21} Wisdom saving throw, taking 22 ({@damage 5d8}) fire damage and 22 ({@damage 5d8}) psychic damage on a failed saving throw, or half as much damage on a successful one.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Psionics)
headerEntries: Kadri casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 17}):

trait.name: Empty Vessel
entries: Kadri automatically fails any saving throw to resist possession by Kaltaresh and can choose to fail a saving throw against possession by any other quori. Additionally, any quori that is on the plane of Dal Quor can attempt to possess Kadri, even while she is awake or unwilling.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (2/Day)
entries: If Kadri fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Kadri has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Natural Explorer
entries: Kadri's movement is not impeded by nonmagical natural environments that are difficult terrain.

trait.name: Survivor
entries: Kadri regains 10 hit points at the start of her turn if she has fewer than half her hit points but at least 1 hit point.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Kadri makes four Longsword attacks.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) slashing damage, or 10 ({@damage 1d10 + 5}) slashing damage if used with two hands, plus 5 ({@damage 1d10}) force damage.

action.name: Dissolution Ray
entries: {@atk rs} {@hit 9} to hit, range 150 ft., one target. {@h}56 ({@damage 16d6}) force damage.

bonus.name: Dimension Step (2nd-Level Spell; 3/Day)
entries: Kadri and all equipment she is wearing or carrying teleports to an unoccupied space she can see within 30 feet of it.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Psionics)
headerEntries: Kadritaresh casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 19}):

trait.name: Dual Mind
entries: Kadritaresh has advantage on all Wisdom saving throws.

trait.name: Battle Trance
entries: Kadritaresh cannot suffer disadvantage when making a melee weapon attack.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If Kadritaresh fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Kadritaresh has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Natural Explorer
entries: Kadritaresh's movement is not impeded by nonmagical natural environments that are difficult terrain.

trait.name: Nightmare Awareness
entries: Kadritaresh can't be {@status surprised} while she isn't {@condition incapacitated}. Additionally, magical darkness doesn't impede Kadritaresh's darkvision, and magic can't put her to sleep.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: Kadritaresh regains 20 hit points at the start of her turn if she has at least 1 hit point and is Inspired by Kaltaresh.

trait.name: Track Hatred
entries: When Kadritaresh deals damage to any creature, she forms a psychic link with the target for 24 hours. During that time, Kadritaresh has advantage on Wisdom ({@skill Survival}) checks to track the target. Kadritaresh can attempt to track the target at any range, even if it is on another plane of existence, and abilities such as the {@spell pass without trace} spell or the ranger's Vanish feature do not impede Kadritaresh's ability to track her target. Even when Kadritaresh is tracking while traveling, she remains alert to danger.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Kadritaresh makes four Longsword attacks.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) slashing damage, or 10 ({@damage 1d10 + 5}) slashing damage if used with two hands, plus 5 ({@damage 1d10}) force damage.

action.name: Dissolution Ray
entries: {@atk rs} {@hit 11} to hit, range 150 ft., one target. {@h}56 ({@damage 16d6}) force damage.

bonus.name: Dimension Step (2nd-Level Spell; 3/Day)
entries: Kadritaresh and all equipment she is wearing or carrying teleports to an unoccupied space she can see within 30 feet of it.

legendary.name: Anger Ray
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 90 ft., one target. {@h}21 ({@damage 6d6}) fire damage.

legendary.name: Manifest Nightmare (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Kadritaresh casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 18}):
At will: crown of madness, flaming sphere, mage hand (the hand is {@condition invisible})
3/day: enemies abound (see Chapter 12), heat metal

legendary.name: Recall Agony (Costs 3 Actions)
entries: Kadritaresh makes a creature recall the most agonizing moments of its past—or future. One creature within 60 feet of Kadritaresh must make a {@dc 18} Wisdom saving throw, taking 67 ({@damage 15d8}) psychic damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Ruukra casts one of the following spells, using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: Ruukra regains 10 hit points at the start of her turn if she has at least 1 hit point.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Ruukra makes two attacks, either with her Claws or her Glaive.

action.name: Claw (Oni Form Only)
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) force damage.

action.name: Glaive
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d10 + 4}) force damage, or 9 ({@damage 1d10 + 4}) force damage in Small or Medium form.

action.name: Cone of Cold (5th-Level Spell; 1/Day)
entries: A blast of cold air erupts from Ruukra's hands in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a {@dc 13} Constitution saving throw, taking 36 ({@damage 8d8}) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one. A creature killed by this spell becomes a frozen statue until it thaws.

bonus.name: Change Shape
entries: Ruukra transforms into a Small or Medium humanoid, into a Large giant, or back into her true form. Other than her size, her statistics are the same in each form. The only equipment that is transformed is Ruukra's glaive and armor, which shrink so that they can be worn and wielded in humanoid form. If Ruukra dies, she reverts to her true form, and her glaive and armor revert to their normal size

bonus.name: Second Wind (Recharges on a Short or Long Rest)
entries: Ruukra regains 6 ({@dice 1d10 + 1}) hit points.

reaction.name: Protector
entries: When a creature within 5 feet of Ruukra that she can see is attacked, Ruukra can impose disadvantage on that attack roll.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Psionics)
headerEntries: Sulatesh casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 17}):

3e: {@spell enemies abound|XGE} (while Inspired only; see Chapter 12)

trait.name: All-Around Vision (While Inspired Only)
entries: Sulatesh can't be {@status surprised} while he isn't {@condition incapacitated}.

trait.name: Battle Trance
entries: Sulatesh cannot suffer disadvantage when making a melee weapon attack.

trait.name: Dual Mind (While Inspired Only)
entries: Sulatesh has advantage on all Wisdom saving throws.

trait.name: Empty Vessel
entries: Sulatesh's Chosen vessel automatically fails any saving throw to resist possession by Sulatesh and can choose to fail a saving throw against possession by any other quori. Additionally, any quori that is on the plane of Dal Quor can attempt to possess Sulatesh's Chosen vessel, even while it is awake or unwilling.

trait.name: Psychokinetic Weapons
entries: Sulatesh's weapon attacks are magical and include a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Sulatesh makes three Deep Crystal Glaive attacks.

action.name: Deep Crystal Glaive
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 13} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}19 ({@damage 2d10 + 8}) slashing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) psychic damage.

reaction.name: Enmity Feedback (5th-Level Spell; Psionic; 3/Day)
entries: When Sulatesh is damaged by a creature that he can see within 60 feet of him, the creature must make a {@dc 17} Wisdom saving throw, taking 33 ({@damage 6d10}) psychic damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

trait.name: Invisible in Water
entries: Kasshta is {@condition invisible} while fully immersed in water.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (2/Day)
entries: If Kasshta fails a saving throw, she can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: Kasshta regains 10 hit points at the start of her turn if she is in contact with running water. Kasshta dies only if she starts her turn with 0 hit points and doesn't regenerate.

trait.name: Rejuvenation
entries: If Kasshta dies, she returns to life in {@dice 1d6} days, appearing anywhere in the Kasshta River and regaining all her hit points. Kasshta's return can only be prevented with a carefully worded {@spell wish} spell or if the entire Kasshta River has dried up.

trait.name: Water Form
entries: Kasshta can enter a hostile creature's space and stop there. It can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Kasshta makes two Water Lash attacks and one Constrict attack.

action.name: Water Lash
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d6 + 6}) slashing damage.

action.name: Constrict
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}27 ({@damage 6d6 + 6}) bludgeoning damage. If the target is Medium or smaller, it is {@condition grappled} (escape {@dc 21}). Until this grapple ends, the target is {@condition restrained} and Kasshta can't make constrict attacks against another target.

action.name: Control Water (4th-Level Spell; At-Will)
entries: Kaashta casts the {@spell control water} spell using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 19}).

legendary.name: Rivers Dashing
entries: Kasshta moves up to her swim speed, even across dry land, without provoking opportunity attacks.

legendary.name: Rivers Winding (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Kaashta makes one Constrict attack.

legendary.name: Rivers Roaring (Costs 3 Actions)
entries: Kasshta releases from her body a magical blast of white water rapids in a line that is 600 feet long and 30 feet wide. Objects in that area take 54 ({@damage 12d8}) bludgeoning damage. Each creature in the area must make a {@dc 19} Constitution saving throw. A creature Kasshta is grappling has disadvantage on this saving throw. Creatures take 9 ({@damage 2d8}) bludgeoning damage, 9 ({@damage 2d8}) cold damage, 9 ({@damage 2d8}) thunder damage and are knocked {@condition prone} and flung up to 60 feet in a direction away from the line on a failed save. Creatures that succeed on the save take half as much damage and aren't knocked {@condition prone} or flung. If a flung target collides with an immovable object (such as a wall or floor) or another creature, the target takes 3 ({@damage 1d6}) bludgeoning damage for every 10 feet it was flung before impact. If the target collides with another creature, that other creature must succeed on a {@dc 17} Strength saving throw or take the same impact damage and be knocked {@condition prone}.

resist.note: from attacks made with weapons that aren't silvered

trait.name: Legendary Leap
entries: Shan Varatel's long jump is up to 12 miles and their high jump is up to 6 miles, with or without a running start. When leaping a distance further than their speed would allow, this movement counts as teleportation.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If Shan Varatel fails a saving throw, they can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Shan Varatel has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Thelanian Protagonist
entries: Shan Varatel can't be permanently killed. If reduced to 0 hit points, they fade away as the sound of a cheering crowd dies down. {@dice 1d4} days later, Shan Varatel reforms in Shae Tan Feilar to raucous fanfare, regaining all their hit points.

trait.name: Up For Any Challenge
entries: Whenever Shan Varatel would make an ability check that is contested by another creature's ability check, Shan Varatel rolls two extra d20s and decides which {@dice d20} to use to determine the results of their check.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Shan Varatel makes three attacks, any of which may be a Slam or Improvised Weapon attack.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 15} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}21 ({@damage 2d12 + 8}) bludgeoning damage. If Shan Varatel has a hand free, the target is {@condition grappled} (escape contested by Shan Varatel's Strength [Athletics] check) and is {@condition restrained} while {@condition grappled} this way if it is Large or smaller. If the target is still {@condition grappled} by the start of Shan Varatel's next turn, Shan Varatel may use it as an Improvised Weapon (see below).

action.name: Improvised Weapon
entries: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack. {@hit 15} to hit, reach 5, 10, or 15 ft. or range 30/90 ft., one target {@h}24 ({@damage 3d10 + 8}) bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage, as appropriate to the improvised weapon used. If the improvised weapon was a creature, both it and the target of the attack take the same amount of damage, which is bludgeoning, and the creature used as an improvised weapon is no longer {@condition grappled}. {@m}If this was a ranged attack and the improvised weapon used was a creature, the creature lands next to the target and takes 24 ({@damage 3d10 + 8}) bludgeoning damage.

bonus.name: Think You Can Beat Me?
entries: One creature that Shan Varatel can see within 60 feet of them must make a {@dc 23} Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the creature is drawn to battle Shan Varatel by this magical curse.
